zh: 我需要付押金吗？
en: Do I need to pay a deposit?

zh: 房东很友好。
en: The landlord is very friendly.

zh: 请把垃圾带下楼。
en: Please take the trash downstairs.

zh: 这套房子离地铁站很近。
en: This apartment is very close to the subway station.

zh: 你能告诉我怎么去新家吗？
en: Can you tell me how to get to the new place?

zh: 浴室的水龙头坏了。
en: The faucet in the bathroom is broken.

zh: 我们打算合租一套三居室。
en: We plan to rent a three-bedroom apartment together.

zh: 别在墙上钉钉子。
en: Don't drive nails into the wall.

zh: 租金每月一号之前支付。
en: The rent is due before the first of each month.

zh: 这间卧室能放得下一张双人床吗？
en: Can this bedroom fit a double bed?

zh: 邻居晚上很吵。
en: The neighbors are very noisy at night.

zh: 请按时缴纳物业费。
en: Please pay the property management fee on time.

zh: 我想续租一年。
en: I want to renew the lease for another year.

zh: 厨房的抽油烟机不好用了。
en: The range hood in the kitchen doesn't work well.

zh: 你以前租过房子吗？
en: Have you rented a house before?

zh: 这套公寓带家具吗？
en: Is this apartment furnished?

zh: 搬进来之前请先打扫干净。
en: Please clean it thoroughly before moving in.

zh: 我可以养宠物吗？
en: Can I keep a pet?

zh: 暖气已经开了，很暖和。
en: The heating is on, and it's very warm.

zh: 这附近有超市吗？
en: Is there a supermarket nearby?

zh: 请准时参加看房预约。
en: Please be on time for the apartment viewing appointment.

zh: 合同里规定了退租要提前一个月通知。
en: The contract states that you must give one month's notice before moving out.

zh: 这栋楼有电梯，很方便。
en: This building has an elevator, which is very convenient.

zh: 你更喜欢高层还是低层？
en: Do you prefer a high floor or a low floor?

zh: 房顶有点漏水。
en: The ceiling is leaking a little.

zh: 我用微信和朋友聊天。
en: I chat with my friends on WeChat.

zh: 你喜欢在社交媒体上发照片吗？
en: Do you like posting photos on social media?

zh: 请不要在评论区发布恶意言论。
en: Please don't post malicious comments in the comment section.

zh: 网络连接不稳定。
en: The network connection is unstable.

zh: 我刚刚更新了我的状态。
en: I just updated my status.

zh: 这个视频在抖音上很火。
en: This video is very popular on TikTok.

zh: 你能帮我点赞吗？
en: Can you give me a like?

zh: 记得关注我们的账号。
en: Remember to follow our account.

zh: 他每天花很多时间刷微博。
en: He spends a lot of time scrolling through Weibo every day.

zh: 网络暴力是一种严重的问题。
en: Cyberbullying is a serious issue.

zh: 你最近在看什么直播？
en: What live stream are you watching recently?

zh: 我已经屏蔽了那个账号。
en: I have blocked that account.

zh: 消息已读不回很不礼貌。
en: It's impolite to read a message and not reply.

zh: 我们需要保护个人隐私。
en: We need to protect personal privacy.

zh: 这个帖子被删除了。
en: This post has been deleted.

zh: 为什么我的评论被隐藏了？
en: Why was my comment hidden?

zh: 请检查你的网络设置。
en: Please check your network settings.

zh: 社交媒体可以让人与人保持联系。
en: Social media can help people stay connected.

zh: 你关注了多少个公众号？
en: How many official accounts do you follow?

zh: 我不太喜欢在朋友圈里发动态。
en: I don't really like posting updates on Moments.

zh: 网络谣言传播得很快。
en: Online rumors spread quickly.

zh: 你收到了新的好友请求。
en: You have a new friend request.

zh: 请勿在群聊中刷屏。
en: Please don't spam the group chat.

zh: 这个表情包很搞笑。
en: This meme is hilarious.

zh: 直播带货已经成为一种新趋势。
en: Live streaming sales have become a new trend.

zh: 你能把链接发给我吗？
en: Could you send me the link?

zh: 我忘记了登录密码。
en: I forgot my login password.

zh: 网络上的信息需要谨慎判断。
en: Information on the internet needs to be carefully evaluated.

zh: 你更喜欢用Instagram还是小红书？
en: Which do you prefer, Instagram or Xiaohongshu?

zh: 请记得点赞、评论和转发。
en: Please remember to like, comment, and share.

zh: 我的猫喜欢在阳光下打盹。
en: My cat likes to nap in the sun.

zh: 你每天遛狗吗？
en: Do you walk your dog every day?

zh: 请给金鱼喂食。
en: Please feed the goldfish.

zh: 这只兔子非常可爱。
en: This rabbit is very cute.

zh: 鹦鹉能学人说话。
en: Parrots can learn to talk.

zh: 你的宠物是什么？
en: What is your pet?

zh: 不要吓到那只猫。
en: Don't scare the cat.

zh: 我每天带小狗去公园玩。
en: I take my puppy to the park every day.

zh: 乌龟活得很久。
en: Turtles live a long time.

zh: 你给仓鼠换了木屑吗？
en: Did you change the bedding for the hamster?

zh: 把狗链拿过来。
en: Bring the dog leash.

zh: 我的猫抓坏了沙发。
en: My cat scratched the sofa.

zh: 宠物需要定期打疫苗。
en: Pets need regular vaccinations.

zh: 你最喜欢什么动物？
en: What animal do you like best?

zh: 你的狗会什么把戏？
en: What tricks can your dog do?

zh: 请安静，小鸟在睡觉。
en: Please be quiet, the bird is sleeping.

zh: 蜥蜴需要紫外线灯。
en: Lizards need a UV lamp.

zh: 为什么猫会咕噜咕噜叫？
en: Why do cats purr?

zh: 带狗去洗个澡。
en: Give the dog a bath.

zh: 我的兔子咬坏了电线。
en: My rabbit chewed through the wire.

zh: 养宠物需要耐心。
en: Keeping a pet requires patience.

zh: 你见过会唱歌的狗吗？
en: Have you ever seen a dog that sings?

zh: 不要把仓鼠的笼子放在太阳下。
en: Don't put the hamster cage in the sun.

zh: 这只白马很温顺。
en: This white horse is very gentle.

zh: 我们给猫买了个新玩具。
en: We bought a new toy for the cat.

zh: 你能帮我遛一下狗吗？
en: Can you help me walk the dog?

zh: 宠物是我们最好的朋友。
en: Pets are our best friends.

zh: 训练狗狗需要奖励。
en: Training a dog requires rewards.

zh: 树上开满了花。
en: The tree is full of blossoms.

zh: 下雨了，记得带伞。
en: It's raining, remember to bring an umbrella.

zh: 森林里的空气很清新。
en: The air in the forest is fresh.

zh: 你能听到鸟叫声吗？
en: Can you hear the birds singing?

zh: 请勿乱扔垃圾。
en: Please do not litter.

zh: 这条河以前很清澈。
en: This river used to be very clear.

zh: 春天来了，万物复苏。
en: Spring has arrived, and everything is reviving.

zh: 为什么天空是蓝色的？
en: Why is the sky blue?

zh: 我们要保护野生动物。
en: We should protect wild animals.

zh: 海边的日落美极了。
en: The sunset at the beach is gorgeous.

zh: 风把树叶吹落了。
en: The wind blew the leaves off the trees.

zh: 这座山有多高？
en: How high is this mountain?

zh: 温室效应导致全球变暖。
en: The greenhouse effect causes global warming.

zh: 我喜欢在雨中散步。
en: I enjoy walking in the rain.

zh: 别踩草坪！
en: Don't step on the grass!

zh: 蜜蜂在花丛中采蜜。
en: Bees are collecting nectar among the flowers.

zh: 昨晚的星空真美啊。
en: The starry sky last night was so beautiful.

zh: 如果不下雨，我们就去远足。
en: If it doesn't rain, we will go hiking.

zh: 垃圾分类有助于环境保护。
en: Waste sorting helps environmental protection.

zh: 这片森林已经存在了上千年。
en: This forest has existed for thousands of years.

zh: 雾霾天气要戴口罩。
en: Wear a mask in hazy weather.

zh: 夏天到了，蝉鸣声声。
en: Summer has come, and cicadas are chirping.

zh: 我们能做些什么来减少污染？
en: What can we do to reduce pollution?

zh: 雪花飘飘，大地一片洁白。
en: Snowflakes are falling, and the ground is all white.

zh: 种一棵树最好的时间是十年前，其次是现在。
en: The best time to plant a tree was ten years ago; the second best is now.

zh: 秋天的落叶像金色的地毯。
en: Autumn leaves are like a golden carpet.

zh: 你见过北极光吗？
en: Have you ever seen the Northern Lights?

zh: 不要向河里排放污水。
en: Do not discharge sewage into the river.

zh: 大自然给了我们一切，我们应该感恩。
en: Nature gives us everything; we should be grateful.

zh: 今天头条新闻是关于选举。
en: Today's top story is about the election.

zh: 你今早看新闻了吗？
en: Did you watch the news this morning?

zh: 请继续关注更多更新。
en: Stay tuned for more updates.

zh: 总统宣布了一项减少碳排放的新政策。
en: The president announced a new policy to reduce carbon emissions.

zh: 记者们对新法律怎么看？
en: What do journalists think about the new law?

zh: 在线阅读全文。
en: Read the full article online.

zh: 股市昨日大幅下跌。
en: The stock market fell sharply yesterday.

zh: 贸易战将如何影响消费者？
en: How will the trade war affect consumers?

zh: 不要错过这条突发新闻。
en: Don't miss this breaking news.

zh: 一场地震袭击了沿海城市，造成了广泛的破坏。
en: An earthquake struck the coastal city, causing widespread damage.

zh: 有证据支持这一指控吗？
en: Is there any evidence to support the allegation?

zh: 订阅我们的新闻通讯以获取每日更新。
en: Subscribe to our newsletter for daily updates.

zh: 记者采访了几位事件目击者。
en: The journalist interviewed several witnesses to the incident.

zh: 政府为何决定解除限制？
en: Why did the government decide to lift the restrictions?

zh: 下午3点观看新闻发布会直播。
en: Watch the press conference live at 3 p.m.

zh: 一项新研究显示社交媒体影响公众舆论。
en: A new study reveals that social media influences public opinion.

zh: 调查结果何时公布？
en: When will the results of the investigation be released?

zh: 在推特上关注我们获取实时更新。
en: Follow us on Twitter for real-time updates.

zh: 法院做出了有利于该媒体公司的裁决。
en: The court ruled in favor of the media company.

zh: 你对最新的政治丑闻有何看法？
en: What's your opinion on the latest political scandal?

zh: 打开电视收看晚间新闻。
en: Turn on the TV for the evening news.

zh: 全国各地爆发了大量抗议新法的活动。
en: Numerous protests erupted across the country over the new law.

zh: 你读过今天《纽约时报》的社论吗？
en: Have you read today's editorial in the New York Times?

zh: 点击此处阅读独家采访。
en: Click here to read the exclusive interview.

zh: 天气预报预测周末将有暴雨。
en: The weather forecast predicts heavy rain for the weekend.

zh: 正在采取什么措施确保记者的安全？
en: What measures are being taken to ensure the safety of the journalists?

zh: 请稍候，市长将发表重要声明。
en: Please stand by for an important announcement from the mayor.

zh: 这一丑闻已占据头条数周。
en: The scandal has dominated headlines for weeks.

zh: 停火协议能带来持久和平吗？
en: Could the ceasefire agreement bring lasting peace?

zh: 把这个故事分享给你的朋友。
en: Share this story with your friends.

zh: 他每天都在努力实现目标。
en: He works hard every day to achieve his goals.

zh: 我们正在制定新的计划。
en: We are making a new plan.

zh: 她希望成为一名医生。
en: She hopes to become a doctor.

zh: 他们计划明年去旅行。
en: They plan to travel next year.

zh: 一步步来，你会实现它的。
en: Take it step by step, and you will achieve it.

zh: 没有计划，梦想只是空谈。
en: Without a plan, a dream is just talk.

zh: 为什么你选择这个职业？
en: Why did you choose this career?

zh: 我们需要一个详细的路线图。
en: We need a detailed roadmap.

zh: 她正在攒钱买房子。
en: She is saving money to buy a house.

zh: 每天写日记能帮你追踪进度。
en: Writing a diary every day helps you track progress.

zh: 他的梦想是环游世界。
en: His dream is to travel around the world.

zh: 请把你的想法写下来。
en: Please write down your ideas.

zh: 我每晚都会反思当天做了哪些努力。
en: Every night I reflect on what I have done that day.

zh: 这个计划听起来很可行。
en: This plan sounds very feasible.

zh: 如果你失败了，你会重新开始吗？
en: If you fail, will you start over?

zh: 他们为了实现梦想牺牲了很多。
en: They sacrificed a lot to realize their dreams.

zh: 向前看，别回头。
en: Look ahead, don't look back.

zh: 她经常梦见自己站在舞台上。
en: She often dreams of standing on a stage.

zh: 这个周末你有安排吗？
en: Do you have any plans this weekend?

zh: 我相信坚持就是胜利。
en: I believe persistence is the key to victory.

zh: 他们正在讨论未来的计划。
en: They are discussing plans for the future.

zh: 不要害怕犯错，那是学习的一部分。
en: Don't be afraid to make mistakes; that's part of learning.

zh: 你能想象十年后的自己吗？
en: Can you imagine yourself ten years from now?

zh: 他决定从明天开始跑步。
en: He decided to start running from tomorrow.

zh: 梦想再大也不嫌大，计划再小也不嫌小。
en: No dream is too big, and no plan is too small.

zh: 早上好，今天天气不错。
en: Good morning, the weather is nice today.

zh: 下午好，你吃了吗？
en: Good afternoon, have you eaten?

zh: 晚上好，最近忙什么呢？
en: Good evening, what have you been up to?

zh: 好久不见，你还好吗？
en: Long time no see, how have you been?

zh: 很高兴见到你！
en: Nice to meet you!

zh: 请坐，别客气。
en: Please sit down, make yourself at home.

zh: 路上小心，注意安全。
en: Take care on the road, stay safe.

zh: 多保重，常联系。
en: Take good care of yourself, keep in touch.

zh: 你最近过得怎么样？
en: How have you been doing lately?

zh: 今天真冷，多穿点衣服。
en: It's really cold today, wear more clothes.

zh: 你今天看起来气色不错。
en: You look great today.

zh: 周末过得愉快吗？
en: Did you have a nice weekend?

zh: 祝你一天好心情！
en: Wish you a great day!

zh: 再见，明天见！
en: Goodbye, see you tomorrow!

zh: 最近有什么新鲜事吗？
en: Anything new with you lately?

zh: 你忙不忙？有空聊聊吗？
en: Are you busy? Got time to chat?

zh: 代我向你家人问好。
en: Say hello to your family for me.

zh: 欢迎来到我家！
en: Welcome to my home!

zh: 今天工作辛苦吗？
en: Did you have a tough day at work?

zh: 好久没聊天了，很想你。
en: We haven't talked in ages, I miss you.

zh: 你看起来有点累，休息一下吧。
en: You look a bit tired, take a rest.

zh: 晚上有空一起吃饭吗？
en: Are you free for dinner tonight?

zh: 对不起，来晚了，路上堵车。
en: Sorry I'm late, traffic was heavy.

zh: 祝你旅途愉快！
en: Have a pleasant trip!

zh: 天冷了，别感冒了。
en: It's getting cold, don't catch a cold.

zh: 你最近在忙什么项目？
en: What project are you working on lately?

zh: 别客气，这是应该的。
en: Don't mention it, it's my pleasure.

zh: 见到你真好，有空常来玩。
en: It's so good to see you, feel free to drop by anytime.

zh: 我想要试穿这件衣服。
en: I'd like to try on this dress.

zh: 你在找什么？
en: What are you looking for?

zh: 这件衬衫打七折。
en: This shirt is 30% off.

zh: 能给我看看那款手机吗？
en: Could you show me that phone?

zh: 这个尺寸不合适。
en: This size doesn't fit.

zh: 我只有一百元现金。
en: I only have a hundred yuan in cash.

zh: 买一送一，很划算。
en: Buy one, get one free, it's a great deal.

zh: 请把购物车放在这里。
en: Please leave the shopping cart here.

zh: 你们有会员卡吗？
en: Do you have a membership card?

zh: 这些苹果多少钱一公斤？
en: How much are these apples per kilo?

zh: 我想退货。
en: I'd like to return this item.

zh: 这个颜色有别的尺码吗？
en: Do you have this color in another size?

zh: 别忘了拿收据。
en: Don't forget to take the receipt.

zh: 特价商品不能退换。
en: Sale items are non-refundable.

zh: 你觉得这条裙子怎么样？
en: What do you think of this dress?

zh: 我需要一个袋子。
en: I need a bag.

zh: 这里可以刷卡吗？
en: Can I pay by card here?

zh: 这个牌子的鞋质量很好。
en: Shoes of this brand are of good quality.

zh: 请把商品放在收银台上。
en: Please place the items on the counter.

zh: 我还在考虑。
en: I'm still thinking about it.

zh: 这件大衣的标价是多少？
en: What is the marked price of this coat?

zh: 买三件可以打八折。
en: You can get 20% off if you buy three.

zh: 你们有保修服务吗？
en: Do you offer warranty service?

zh: 这双鞋穿着很舒服。
en: These shoes feel very comfortable.

zh: 网上价格比店里便宜。
en: The online price is cheaper than in the store.

zh: 别买太多，会过期的。
en: Don't buy too much, it will expire.

zh: 能帮我查一下库存吗？
en: Can you check the stock for me?

zh: 我想订一个两人桌。
en: I'd like to book a table for two.

zh: 请问今天有什么推荐？
en: What do you recommend today?

zh: 这道菜辣吗？
en: Is this dish spicy?

zh: 我想点一份牛排，五分熟。
en: I'd like a steak, medium rare.

zh: 我们还需要一些时间看菜单。
en: We need a few more minutes to look at the menu.

zh: 你能帮我推荐一个开胃菜吗？
en: Could you recommend an appetizer?

zh: 请来一杯水。
en: A glass of water, please.

zh: 这道菜看起来真不错。
en: This dish looks really good.

zh: 我点的菜还没有上。
en: My order hasn't arrived yet.

zh: 麻烦再加一份面包。
en: Another bread, please.

zh: 有没有素食选项？
en: Do you have any vegetarian options?

zh: 我想要甜点菜单。
en: I'd like to see the dessert menu.

zh: 我们点的菜都齐了吗？
en: Have all our dishes been served?

zh: 能给我账单吗？
en: Can I have the bill, please?

zh: 我们AA制。
en: We'll split the bill.

zh: 服务员，这里！
en: Waiter, over here!

zh: 这道菜是招牌菜吗？
en: Is this a signature dish?

zh: 我想尝尝你们的特色披萨。
en: I want to try your specialty pizza.

zh: 请少放点盐。
en: Less salt, please.

zh: 这个酱汁很美味。
en: The sauce is delicious.

zh: 我要一杯咖啡，不加糖。
en: I'll have a coffee, no sugar.

zh: 请问洗手间在哪里？
en: Excuse me, where is the restroom?

zh: 我们想坐靠窗的位置。
en: We'd like a table by the window.

zh: 这道菜里含坚果吗？
en: Does this dish contain nuts?

zh: 这里的服务很棒。
en: The service here is great.

zh: 谢谢款待，我们吃得很满意。
en: Thank you for the hospitality, we enjoyed the meal very much.

zh: 沿着这条街直走，然后左转。
en: Go straight along this street, then turn left.

zh: 你知道附近有好的餐厅吗？
en: Do you know any good restaurants nearby?

zh: 我迷路了，你能帮我吗？
en: I'm lost, can you help me?

zh: 这个博物馆在哪个方向？
en: Which direction is the museum?

zh: 从这里到火车站大约有多远？
en: How far is it from here to the train station?

zh: 请带我去这个地址。
en: Please take me to this address.

zh: 过两个红绿灯后右转。
en: Turn right after two traffic lights.

zh: 你可以坐公交车去那里。
en: You can take a bus to get there.

zh: 我想去市中心，应该坐哪路车？
en: I want to go to the city center, which bus should I take?

zh: 附近有公共厕所吗？
en: Is there a public restroom nearby?

zh: 步行大概需要十五分钟。
en: It's about a fifteen-minute walk.

zh: 你最好打个车，因为路程有点远。
en: You'd better take a taxi, because it's a bit far.

zh: 这个教堂对面就是邮局。
en: The post office is right across from this church.

zh: 请再说一遍，我没听清。
en: Please say it again, I didn't catch that.

zh: 向左走到第二个路口，你就能看到了。
en: Go left to the second intersection, and you'll see it.

zh: 这条路通往海滩吗？
en: Does this road lead to the beach?

zh: 谢谢你的帮助，我找到了。
en: Thanks for your help, I found it.

zh: 不要直走，应该往右拐。
en: Don't go straight, you should turn right.

zh: 请问，这附近有药店吗？
en: Excuse me, is there a pharmacy around here?

zh: 沿着河边走，你会看到一座桥。
en: Walk along the river, and you'll see a bridge.

zh: 从这里到机场开车要一个小时。
en: It takes an hour to drive from here to the airport.

zh: 出站后右转，直走五百米就到了。
en: After exiting the station, turn right and go straight for 500 meters.

zh: 请问，这班车去火车站吗？
en: Excuse me, does this bus go to the train station?

zh: 下一个十字路口有红绿灯吗？
en: Is there a traffic light at the next crossroads?

zh: 如果你看到一家蓝色的咖啡店，就说明走对了。
en: If you see a blue coffee shop, you are on the right track.

zh: 别担心，你离目的地很近了。
en: Don't worry, you are very close to your destination.

zh: 请直走，然后在第三个路口左转。
en: Please go straight, then turn left at the third crossing.

zh: 会议在下午三点开始。
en: The meeting starts at three in the afternoon.

zh: 你参加昨天的会议了吗？
en: Did you attend yesterday's meeting?

zh: 我们需要讨论这个项目的进度。
en: We need to discuss the progress of this project.

zh: 把议程发给大家。
en: Send the agenda to everyone.

zh: 会议被取消了。
en: The meeting has been canceled.

zh: 你能在会上做个简短介绍吗？
en: Could you give a brief introduction at the meeting?

zh: 我们在十楼会议室见面。
en: We'll meet in the conference room on the tenth floor.

zh: 这个季度销售额增长了。
en: Sales have increased this quarter.

zh: 别忘了带上你的笔记本。
en: Don't forget to bring your notebook.

zh: 会议持续了两个小时。
en: The meeting lasted two hours.

zh: 请在周五前完成这项任务。
en: Please complete this task by Friday.

zh: 他的发言非常精彩。
en: His speech was very impressive.

zh: 我们可以把讨论推迟到明天吗？
en: Can we postpone the discussion until tomorrow?

zh: 这个提案还需要修改。
en: This proposal still needs revision.

zh: 大家对这个方案有什么看法？
en: What do you think of this plan?

zh: 我们正在筹备一个重要的客户会议。
en: We are preparing for an important client meeting.

zh: 请确认一下你的出席。
en: Please confirm your attendance.

zh: 会议议程包括三个主要议题。
en: The meeting agenda includes three main topics.

zh: 他建议我们重新考虑预算。
en: He suggested we reconsider the budget.

zh: 你应该提前五分钟到达。
en: You should arrive five minutes early.

zh: 这个项目是否按时完成了？
en: Was this project completed on time?

zh: 请保持安静，会议正在进行。
en: Please keep quiet, the meeting is in progress.

zh: 我们需要更有效的时间管理。
en: We need more effective time management.

zh: 把这份文件扫描后发邮件给我。
en: Scan this document and email it to me.

zh: 今天下午的视频会议效果如何？
en: How was this afternoon's video conference?

zh: 她负责协调各部门的工作。
en: She is responsible for coordinating the work of all departments.

zh: 会议结束后，我会把纪要发给大家。
en: After the meeting, I will send the minutes to everyone.

zh: 他在教室里学习。
en: He is studying in the classroom.

zh: 你每天读英语吗？
en: Do you read English every day?

zh: 请打开你的书。
en: Please open your book.

zh: 这道数学题太难了。
en: This math problem is too difficult.

zh: 我们明天考试，你准备好了吗？
en: We have an exam tomorrow. Are you ready?

zh: 老师解释了这个语法点。
en: The teacher explained this grammar point.

zh: 多练习就能进步。
en: You can improve with more practice.

zh: 他为什么没来上课？
en: Why didn't he come to class?

zh: 请把作业交给我。
en: Please hand in your homework to me.

zh: 学习一门新语言需要耐心。
en: Learning a new language requires patience.

zh: 图书馆里很安静。
en: It is very quiet in the library.

zh: 你能帮我复习一下这些单词吗？
en: Can you help me review these words?

zh: 别在课堂上说话。
en: Don't talk in class.

zh: 这篇文章的内容很有意思。
en: The content of this article is very interesting.

zh: 她通过自学掌握了编程。
en: She mastered programming through self-study.

zh: 认真听讲是学习的关键。
en: Listening carefully is the key to learning.

zh: 你的笔记本能借我用一下吗？
en: Can I borrow your notebook?

zh: 教育不仅是知识的传递，更是思维的培养。
en: Education is not only about passing on knowledge, but also about cultivating thinking.

zh: 请用完整的句子回答问题。
en: Please answer the question in complete sentences.

zh: 他喜欢在小组讨论中发言。
en: He likes to speak up in group discussions.

zh: 这个实验的结果如何？
en: What are the results of this experiment?

zh: 每天复习功课可以巩固记忆。
en: Reviewing lessons every day can consolidate memory.

zh: 老师让我们写一篇关于环保的作文。
en: The teacher asked us to write an essay about environmental protection.

zh: 学而时习之，不亦说乎？
en: Is it not a pleasure to learn and practice what you have learned?

zh: 我需要更多的时间来完成这个项目。
en: I need more time to finish this project.

zh: 别忘记带你的学生证。
en: Don't forget to bring your student ID.

zh: 这位教授在学术领域很有名。
en: This professor is well-known in the academic field.

zh: 终身学习是现代社会的要求。
en: Lifelong learning is a requirement in modern society.

zh: 外面在下雨，别忘了带伞。
en: It's raining outside, don't forget to bring an umbrella.

zh: 你最喜欢的季节是什么？
en: What's your favorite season?

zh: 春天来了，花儿都开了。
en: Spring has come, and the flowers are blooming.

zh: 冬天很冷，要多穿衣服。
en: Winter is cold; you should wear more clothes.

zh: 夏天太热了，我们去游泳吧。
en: It's too hot in summer; let's go swimming.

zh: 秋风扫落叶，景色很美。
en: The autumn wind sweeps the fallen leaves; the scenery is beautiful.

zh: 请把窗户关上，外面风大。
en: Please close the window; it's windy outside.

zh: 今天气温多少度？
en: What's the temperature today?

zh: 下雪天要注意路滑。
en: Be careful of slippery roads on snowy days.

zh: 春天是放风筝的好季节。
en: Spring is a good season for flying kites.

zh: 你那里天气怎么样？
en: How's the weather where you are?

zh: 别在烈日下待太久。
en: Don't stay too long under the scorching sun.

zh: 我喜欢秋天的凉爽和落叶。
en: I like the coolness and fallen leaves of autumn.

zh: 这个夏天雨水特别多。
en: There has been a lot of rain this summer.

zh: 多云转晴，适合外出散步。
en: Cloudy turning sunny, suitable for a walk outside.

zh: 下这么大的雨，我们改天再出去玩吧。
en: It's raining so hard; let's go out another day.

zh: 冬天来了，春天还会远吗？
en: If winter comes, can spring be far behind?

zh: 请记得带上外套，晚上会凉。
en: Please remember to bring a jacket; it will be cool in the evening.

zh: 台风警报发布了，注意安全。
en: A typhoon warning has been issued; stay safe.

zh: 这里四季如春，气候宜人。
en: It's like spring all year round here, with a pleasant climate.

zh: 为什么夏天白天比冬天长？
en: Why are summer days longer than winter days?

zh: 这暴风雨来得太突然了。
en: The storm came so suddenly.

zh: 春天适合播种，秋天适合收获。
en: Spring is good for sowing, and autumn for harvesting.

zh: 大雾天开车要减速慢行。
en: Drive slowly and carefully in heavy fog.

zh: 你更愿意住在四季分明的地方吗？
en: Would you rather live in a place with four distinct seasons?

zh: 雨停了，彩虹出来了。
en: The rain has stopped, and a rainbow appeared.

zh: 多喝热水。
en: Drink plenty of warm water.

zh: 请把药吃了。
en: Please take your medicine.

zh: 我需要预约医生。
en: I need to make a doctor's appointment.

zh: 我肚子疼得厉害。
en: I have a terrible stomachache.

zh: 请张开嘴巴。
en: Please open your mouth.

zh: 你咳嗽多久了？
en: How long have you been coughing?

zh: 我有点头晕。
en: I feel a bit dizzy.

zh: 别担心，只是小感冒。
en: Don't worry, it's just a mild cold.

zh: 你能帮我量一下体温吗？
en: Can you take my temperature?

zh: 请保持室内通风。
en: Please keep the room ventilated.

zh: 我昨天摔了一跤，膝盖破了。
en: I fell yesterday and scraped my knee.

zh: 你需要做一次检查。
en: You need to have a check-up.

zh: 这种药一天吃三次。
en: Take this medicine three times a day.

zh: 你过敏什么药物？
en: Are you allergic to any medication?

zh: 我嗓子疼，吞咽困难。
en: I have a sore throat and difficulty swallowing.

zh: 请深呼吸。
en: Please take a deep breath.

zh: 伤口要消毒。
en: The wound needs to be disinfected.

zh: 你血压有点高。
en: Your blood pressure is a bit high.

zh: 我昨晚失眠了。
en: I couldn't sleep last night.

zh: 请记住下次复诊的时间。
en: Please remember the time for your next follow-up visit.

zh: 他住院了，但情况稳定。
en: He was hospitalized, but his condition is stable.

zh: 你最好多休息。
en: You should get more rest.

zh: 为什么你的脸色这么差？
en: Why do you look so pale?

zh: 我建议你少熬夜。
en: I suggest you avoid staying up late.

zh: 保持良好的生活习惯能预防疾病。
en: Maintaining good living habits can prevent diseases.

zh: 你周末会回家吗？
en: Will you come home this weekend?

zh: 请把照片传给奶奶。
en: Please pass the photo to grandma.

zh: 我们全家一起看了场电影。
en: Our whole family watched a movie together.

zh: 弟弟总是抢我的玩具。
en: My little brother always takes my toys.

zh: 爸爸下班后喜欢在沙发上打盹。
en: Dad likes to nap on the sofa after work.

zh: 你多久给父母打一次电话？
en: How often do you call your parents?

zh: 别忘了拥抱一下妹妹。
en: Don't forget to give your sister a hug.

zh: 爷爷的胡茬扎得我痒痒的。
en: Grandpa's stubble tickles me.

zh: 外婆总是给我织毛衣。
en: Grandma always knits sweaters for me.

zh: 今晚我们吃团圆饭吧。
en: Let's have a family reunion dinner tonight.

zh: 你能帮我照顾一下侄子吗？
en: Could you help me look after my nephew?

zh: 女儿的笑声让整个家充满阳光。
en: My daughter's laughter fills the house with sunshine.

zh: 夫妻之间应该互相尊重。
en: Husband and wife should respect each other.

zh: 那条围巾是姐姐亲手织的。
en: That scarf was knitted by my elder sister herself.

zh: 别对妈妈大声说话。
en: Don't speak loudly to Mom.

zh: 你为什么从来不带朋友回家？
en: Why do you never bring friends home?

zh: 孩子需要父母的陪伴。
en: Children need their parents' company.

zh: 奶奶做的饺子总是最香的。
en: The dumplings Grandma makes are always the most delicious.

zh: 父亲的肩膀扛起了整个家。
en: Father's shoulders carry the whole family.

zh: 你能陪我一起去接姥姥吗？
en: Can you come with me to pick up Grandma?

zh: 家是心灵的港湾。
en: Home is a harbor for the heart.

zh: 你要好好孝顺父母。
en: You should truly honor your parents.

zh: 表弟下个月要结婚了。
en: My cousin is getting married next month.

zh: 妈妈教我学会了骑车。
en: Mom taught me how to ride a bike.

zh: 家庭聚会总是热闹非凡。
en: Family gatherings are always full of fun.

zh: 兄弟姐妹要互帮互助。
en: Siblings should help each other.

zh: 你怀没怀念小时候全家旅行的日子？
en: Do you miss the family trips from when we were kids?

zh: 即使离家很远，心也一直在一起。
en: Even far away from home, our hearts are always together.

zh: 我今天很开心。
en: I am very happy today.

zh: 你为什么这么伤心？
en: Why are you so sad?

zh: 请保持微笑。
en: Please keep smiling.

zh: 她感到有点焦虑。
en: She feels a bit anxious.

zh: 他的愤怒终于爆发了。
en: His anger finally exploded.

zh: 别让恐惧控制你。
en: Don't let fear control you.

zh: 我深深地爱着你。
en: I love you deeply.

zh: 这消息让我们都很沮丧。
en: This news made us all depressed.

zh: 你感到孤独吗？
en: Do you feel lonely?

zh: 他满怀希望地开始了新生活。
en: He started his new life full of hope.

zh: 请表达你的真实感受。
en: Please express your true feelings.

zh: 她的快乐感染了所有人。
en: Her happiness infected everyone.

zh: 我对这结果很失望。
en: I am very disappointed with the result.

zh: 为什么你总是这么烦躁？
en: Why are you always so irritable?

zh: 拥抱可以传递温暖与安慰。
en: Hugs can convey warmth and comfort.

zh: 他因失去而悲痛不已。
en: He was overwhelmed with grief over the loss.

zh: 孩子的好奇心是最珍贵的。
en: A child's curiosity is the most precious.

zh: 别压抑自己的情绪。
en: Don't suppress your emotions.

zh: 我们为你的成功感到骄傲。
en: We are proud of your success.

zh: 她的眼神里充满了羡慕。
en: Her eyes were full of envy.

zh: 这场雨让我的心情变得忧郁。
en: The rain made my mood melancholic.

zh: 你最近感觉怎么样？
en: How have you been feeling lately?

zh: 请相信你的直觉。
en: Please trust your instincts.

zh: 他带着深深的悔恨离开了。
en: He left with deep regret.

zh: 惊喜让她尖叫起来。
en: The surprise made her scream.

zh: 你为什么如此激动？
en: Why are you so excited?

zh: 她努力掩饰内心的不安。
en: She tried to hide her inner unease.

zh: 暴风雨过后，大家都松了一口气。
en: After the storm, everyone breathed a sigh of relief.

zh: 他的冷漠让我很受伤。
en: His indifference hurt me deeply.

zh: 请记住，愤怒解决不了问题。
en: Please remember, anger won't solve problems.

zh: 打开电脑。
en: Turn on the computer.

zh: 你用过这个软件吗？
en: Have you used this software before?

zh: 请关闭所有窗口。
en: Please close all windows.

zh: 我的电脑速度很慢。
en: My computer is very slow.

zh: 如何重置密码？
en: How do I reset the password?

zh: 这款处理器性能很强。
en: This processor has great performance.

zh: 记得定期备份数据。
en: Remember to back up your data regularly.

zh: 我下载了一个新的应用程序。
en: I downloaded a new application.

zh: 这个屏幕分辨率很高。
en: This screen has a high resolution.

zh: 你在编程吗？
en: Are you programming?

zh: 请插入U盘。
en: Please insert the USB drive.

zh: 我需要更新驱动程序。
en: I need to update the drivers.

zh: 可以教我安装系统吗？
en: Can you teach me how to install the system?

zh: 这台电脑已经用了五年。
en: This computer has been used for five years.

zh: 请勿在充电时使用电脑。
en: Do not use the computer while charging.

zh: 你用什么操作系统？
en: What operating system do you use?

zh: 打印文档之前先预览。
en: Preview the document before printing.

zh: 这个文件太大了，无法发送。
en: This file is too large to send.

zh: 我忘记保存了，全丢了。
en: I forgot to save, and everything was lost.

zh: 摄像头没有打开。
en: The camera is not turned on.

zh: 关机前请保存进度。
en: Please save your progress before shutting down.

zh: 数据库需要优化。
en: The database needs optimization.

zh: 你能帮我修一下键盘吗？
en: Can you help me fix the keyboard?

zh: 这个网站加载很慢。
en: This website loads very slowly.

zh: 我们升级了服务器。
en: We upgraded the server.

zh: 请扫描病毒。
en: Please scan for viruses.

zh: 我习惯用快捷键。
en: I'm used to using keyboard shortcuts.

zh: 固态硬盘比机械硬盘快很多。
en: SSDs are much faster than HDDs.

zh: 输入密码后按回车。
en: Press Enter after entering the password.

zh: 我每天早晨跑步半小时。
en: I run for half an hour every morning.

zh: 你经常去健身房吗？
en: Do you often go to the gym?

zh: 举重能增强肌肉力量。
en: Weightlifting builds muscle strength.

zh: 请在做运动前先热身。
en: Please warm up before exercising.

zh: 游泳是一项全身运动。
en: Swimming is a full-body workout.

zh: 他昨天跑了五公里。
en: He ran five kilometers yesterday.

zh: 为什么你不试试瑜伽？
en: Why don't you try yoga?

zh: 保持水分对健身很重要。
en: Staying hydrated is important for fitness.

zh: 深呼吸，然后慢慢呼气。
en: Take a deep breath, then exhale slowly.

zh: 她每周做三次力量训练。
en: She does strength training three times a week.

zh: 健身能改善你的心情。
en: Exercise can improve your mood.

zh: 你需要一个健身搭档吗？
en: Do you need a workout buddy?

zh: 别忘记运动后做拉伸。
en: Don't forget to stretch after exercise.

zh: 骑自行车对膝盖很友好。
en: Cycling is easy on the knees.

zh: 我更喜欢户外跑步。
en: I prefer running outdoors.

zh: 跳绳是一种高效的有氧运动。
en: Jumping rope is an efficient cardio exercise.

zh: 让我们做一些核心训练吧。
en: Let's do some core exercises.

zh: 他因为受伤暂停了训练。
en: He paused his training due to an injury.

zh: 健身新手应该从轻重量开始。
en: Fitness beginners should start with light weights.

zh: 你通常锻炼多长时间？
en: How long do you usually work out?

zh: 平板支撑能锻炼腹部肌肉。
en: Planks work your abdominal muscles.

zh: 请保持背部挺直。
en: Please keep your back straight.

zh: 运动后洗个热水澡很舒服。
en: Taking a hot shower after exercise is relaxing.

zh: 她正在为马拉松做准备。
en: She is preparing for a marathon.

zh: 登山机比跑步机更累。
en: The stair climber is more tiring than the treadmill.

zh: 你更喜欢有氧还是无氧？
en: Do you prefer cardio or strength training?

zh: 每天走一万步是个好目标。
en: Walking 10,000 steps a day is a good goal.

zh: 每组动作之间休息一分钟。
en: Rest for one minute between each set.

zh: 健身需要坚持和耐心。
en: Fitness requires consistency and patience.

zh: 我明天早上九点有一个会议。
en: I have a meeting at nine o'clock tomorrow morning.

zh: 你今晚有什么安排吗？
en: Do you have any plans for tonight?

zh: 请把这份报告在周五之前交给我。
en: Please submit this report to me by Friday.

zh: 我们的航班是下午三点半起飞。
en: Our flight departs at 3:30 p.m.

zh: 她通常周末去健身房锻炼。
en: She usually goes to the gym on weekends.

zh: 这个项目需要在下周一完成吗？
en: Does this project need to be finished by next Monday?

zh: 别迟到，面试十点整开始。
en: Don't be late; the interview starts at ten o'clock sharp.

zh: 我们可以在午餐时间讨论一下日程。
en: We can discuss the schedule during lunchtime.

zh: 你什么时候有空来办公室一趟？
en: When will you be free to come to the office?

zh: 他们计划在下个月搬家。
en: They plan to move next month.

zh: 请记得把明天的约会记在日历上。
en: Please remember to put tomorrow's appointment on the calendar.

zh: 这次旅行持续整整两周。
en: The trip lasts for two whole weeks.

zh: 你能不能把会议推迟到下午两点？
en: Can you postpone the meeting to 2 p.m.?

zh: 我每天早晨七点起床跑步。
en: I get up at seven every morning to go running.

zh: 截止日期是什么时候？
en: What is the deadline?

zh: 我们最好提前半小时到达火车站。
en: We'd better arrive at the train station half an hour early.

zh: 这周的工作日程排得满满当当。
en: This week's work schedule is packed.

zh: 你周六下午有什么特别的事情吗？
en: Do you have anything special on Saturday afternoon?

zh: 会议预计持续一个小时。
en: The meeting is expected to last one hour.

zh: 请尽快确认你的出席时间。
en: Please confirm your attendance time as soon as possible.

zh: 她每天晚上十一点前必须睡觉。
en: She has to sleep before eleven every night.

zh: 我们的假期从下周三开始。
en: Our vacation starts next Wednesday.

zh: 你怎么安排这个周末的活动？
en: How do you arrange your activities for this weekend?

zh: 这个讲座时间冲突了，我需要调整日程。
en: This lecture is overlapping, so I need to adjust my schedule.

zh: 下午茶时间定在三点。
en: Afternoon tea is scheduled at three o'clock.

zh: 你最好在出发前检查一下日程表。
en: You'd better check the schedule before you leave.

zh: 他最近总是加班到很晚。
en: He has been working overtime until late recently.

zh: 我们下周四要召开季度总结会议。
en: We are going to hold the quarterly review meeting next Thursday.

zh: 你能把这个预约改到明天吗？
en: Can you change this appointment to tomorrow?

zh: 整个培训计划将持续四周。
en: The entire training program will last four weeks.

zh: 我每天坐地铁去上班。
en: I take the subway to work every day.

zh: 你能告诉我去火车站怎么走吗？
en: Can you tell me how to get to the train station?

zh: 请在前面的路口左转。
en: Please turn left at the next intersection.

zh: 这辆公交车去市中心吗？
en: Does this bus go to the city center?

zh: 坐出租车比坐地铁贵得多。
en: Taking a taxi is much more expensive than taking the subway.

zh: 我通常骑自行车去学校。
en: I usually ride my bike to school.

zh: 小心，前面有行人。
en: Be careful, there are pedestrians ahead.

zh: 下一站是博物馆，请准备下车。
en: The next stop is the museum, please get ready to get off.

zh: 由于交通堵塞，我们迟到了。
en: We were late because of the traffic jam.

zh: 去机场需要多长时间？
en: How long does it take to get to the airport?

zh: 这个地铁站有电梯吗？
en: Does this subway station have an elevator?

zh: 你可以在路边叫出租车。
en: You can hail a taxi on the roadside.

zh: 红灯亮时不要过马路。
en: Don't cross the street when the light is red.

zh: 共享单车很方便，但记得停在指定区域。
en: Bike-sharing is convenient, but remember to park in designated areas.

zh: 我走路去超市大概十分钟。
en: It takes me about ten minutes to walk to the supermarket.

zh: 你能帮我查一下去北京的高铁时刻表吗？
en: Could you check the high-speed train schedule to Beijing for me?

zh: 在高峰期，这条路很容易堵车。
en: During rush hour, this road gets congested easily.

zh: 请把车窗摇下来一点。
en: Please roll down the window a bit.

zh: 这趟航班晚点了一小时。
en: This flight is delayed by one hour.

zh: 你通常怎么去机场？
en: How do you usually get to the airport?

zh: 过马路前先看看左右。
en: Look left and right before crossing the street.

zh: 我迷路了，你能帮我指一下方向吗？
en: I'm lost, can you point me in the right direction?

zh: 汽车需要加油了。
en: The car needs to be refueled.

zh: 骑摩托车一定要戴头盔。
en: You must wear a helmet when riding a motorcycle.

zh: 这里可以停车吗？
en: Can I park here?

zh: 地铁票可以用手机支付。
en: You can pay for the subway ticket with your phone.

zh: 步行比开车更环保。
en: Walking is more environmentally friendly than driving.

zh: 请站在黄线后面。
en: Please stand behind the yellow line.

zh: 我现在不方便接电话。
en: I'm not available to take the call right now.

zh: 请稍等一下，我帮你转接。
en: Please hold on, I'll transfer you.

zh: 你能再说一遍吗？信号不太好。
en: Could you say that again? The signal is not great.

zh: 他正在开会，需要我留言吗？
en: He is in a meeting. Would you like to leave a message?

zh: 我稍后会回电话给你。
en: I'll call you back later.

zh: 请问您是哪位？
en: May I ask who's calling?

zh: 别挂断，我去叫他。
en: Don't hang up, I'll go get him.

zh: 这个电话是打给谁的？
en: Who is this call for?

zh: 请留下你的姓名和号码。
en: Please leave your name and number.

zh: 你能大点声吗？我听不太清楚。
en: Could you speak up a bit? I can't hear you clearly.

zh: 明天早上我再给你打电话。
en: I'll call you again tomorrow morning.

zh: 她正在通话中，你要等一会儿吗？
en: She's on another call. Would you like to wait?

zh: 请直接拨分机号。
en: Please dial the extension number directly.

zh: 你能发短信确认一下吗？
en: Could you send a text message to confirm?

zh: 电话会议几点开始？
en: What time does the conference call start?

zh: 请把电话转给经理。
en: Please put me through to the manager.

zh: 我可能漏接了你的电话。
en: I might have missed your call.

zh: 不要用免提说话。
en: Don't use the speakerphone.

zh: 这个号码已经停机了。
en: This number is out of service.

zh: 我待会儿再打过来。
en: I'll call back later.

zh: 请把留言发到我的邮箱。
en: Please send the message to my email.

zh: 你的电话占线了。
en: Your line was busy.

zh: 别挂，我马上回来。
en: Stay on the line, I'll be right back.

zh: 你在哪里打的电话？
en: Where are you calling from?

zh: 我明天会有空接电话。
en: I'll be free to answer calls tomorrow.

zh: 帮我查一下通话记录。
en: Check the call log for me.

zh: 这个电话非常重要。
en: This call is very important.

zh: 我喜欢听音乐。
en: I like listening to music.

zh: 她最近爱上了画画。
en: She has recently fallen in love with painting.

zh: 我对摄影特别感兴趣。
en: I am particularly interested in photography.

zh: 不要总是宅在家里，出去运动运动吧。
en: Don't always stay at home. Go out and do some exercise.

zh: 你多久弹一次钢琴？
en: How often do you play the piano?

zh: 我觉得钓鱼能让人静下心来。
en: I think fishing can calm a person down.

zh: 他最大的爱好是收集邮票。
en: His biggest hobby is collecting stamps.

zh: 咱们试试做蛋糕怎么样？
en: How about we try making a cake?

zh: 为什么不去学一门乐器呢？
en: Why not learn a musical instrument?

zh: 她每天都会读半小时的书。
en: She reads books for half an hour every day.

zh: 我小时候很喜欢放风筝。
en: I really liked flying kites when I was a child.

zh: 你对园艺有研究吗？
en: Do you know much about gardening?

zh: 请把吉他递给我。
en: Please hand me the guitar.

zh: 练瑜伽让我感觉身心放松。
en: Doing yoga makes me feel relaxed both physically and mentally.

zh: 你能教我下棋吗？
en: Can you teach me how to play chess?

zh: 我们下午去打羽毛球吧。
en: Let's play badminton this afternoon.

zh: 他除了工作之外就喜欢养花。
en: Apart from work, he likes growing flowers.

zh: 你喜欢看什么类型的电影？
en: What type of movies do you like to watch?

zh: 我试着学做陶艺，但太难了。
en: I tried to learn pottery, but it's too difficult.

zh: 跑步是他每天必做的事情。
en: Running is something he does every day without fail.

zh: 咱们一起去逛书店吧。
en: Let's go to the bookstore together.

zh: 她热衷于跳拉丁舞。
en: She is passionate about Latin dancing.

zh: 别在房间里玩滑板。
en: Don't skateboard in the room.

zh: 你曾经试过潜水吗？
en: Have you ever tried scuba diving?

zh: 我偶尔会写写日记。
en: I occasionally write in my diary.

zh: 他觉得打游戏是浪费时间。
en: He thinks playing video games is a waste of time.

zh: 请告诉我你最喜欢的手工是什么。
en: Please tell me what your favorite craft is.

zh: 要是天气好，我们就去湖边野餐。
en: If the weather is good, we'll have a picnic by the lake.

zh: 春节是中国最重要的节日。
en: The Spring Festival is the most important holiday in China.

zh: 别忘了准备生日礼物。
en: Don't forget to prepare a birthday gift.

zh: 我们每年都会举办一场盛大的聚会。
en: We hold a big party every year.

zh: 这个节日让我想起了家乡。
en: This festival reminds me of my hometown.

zh: 你们那里端午节吃粽子吗？
en: Do you eat zongzi during the Dragon Boat Festival?

zh: 请把彩灯挂起来。
en: Please hang up the colorful lights.

zh: 烟花表演真壮观！
en: The fireworks display is magnificent!

zh: 孩子们最喜欢万圣节了，因为他们可以要糖果。
en: Children love Halloween the most because they can ask for candies.

zh: 感恩节我们要和家人一起吃火鸡。
en: On Thanksgiving, we eat turkey with family.

zh: 你能帮我装饰一下客厅吗？
en: Could you help me decorate the living room?

zh: 情人节我打算给女朋友送一束花。
en: I plan to give my girlfriend a bouquet of flowers on Valentine's Day.

zh: 国庆节期间高速公路免费。
en: Highways are free during the National Day holiday.

zh: 让我们为她的生日干杯！
en: Let's toast to her birthday!

zh: 你对圣诞节有什么特别的记忆吗？
en: Do you have any special memories of Christmas?

zh: 中秋节赏月是传统习俗。
en: Enjoying the moon is a tradition during the Mid-Autumn Festival.

zh: 今年春节我们全家要去旅行。
en: Our whole family will travel during the Spring Festival this year.

zh: 请不要在派对上吸烟。
en: Please don't smoke at the party.

zh: 复活节彩蛋通常被涂成各种颜色。
en: Easter eggs are usually painted in various colors.

zh: 这个节日是为了纪念历史事件而设立的。
en: This festival was established to commemorate a historical event.

zh: 你收到圣诞礼物了吗？
en: Did you receive any Christmas gifts?

zh: 庆祝活动从早上一直持续到深夜。
en: The celebration lasted from morning until late night.

zh: 我们要为新年许个愿。
en: Let's make a wish for the new year.

zh: 母亲节那天，我帮妈妈做家务。
en: On Mother's Day, I helped my mother with housework.

zh: 他们唱着歌跳着舞度过了狂欢节。
en: They sang and danced through the carnival.

zh: 你喜欢喜庆的气氛吗？
en: Do you like the festive atmosphere?

zh: 请把生日蛋糕切成十块。
en: Please cut the birthday cake into ten pieces.

zh: 这个节日提醒我们珍惜身边的人。
en: This festival reminds us to cherish the people around us.

zh: 我的银行账户里没有钱了。
en: I have no money left in my bank account.

zh: 请把这张支票存入我的账户。
en: Please deposit this check into my account.

zh: 你每月需要偿还贷款吗？
en: Do you need to repay the loan every month?

zh: 转账手续费是多少？
en: What's the transfer fee?

zh: 别在自动取款机前泄露密码。
en: Don't reveal your PIN in front of the ATM.

zh: 我想开一个储蓄账户。
en: I'd like to open a savings account.

zh: 这家银行的利率比那家高。
en: This bank offers a higher interest rate than that one.

zh: 你可以在网上办理大部分银行业务。
en: You can handle most banking services online.

zh: 我需要兑换一些外币。
en: I need to exchange some foreign currency.

zh: 你的信用卡透支了吗？
en: Did you overdraw your credit card?

zh: 请核对一下你的账户余额。
en: Please check your account balance.

zh: 她每个月都存一部分工资。
en: She saves a portion of her salary every month.

zh: 我没有足够的现金付账。
en: I don't have enough cash to pay the bill.

zh: 请问哪里可以办理汇款？
en: Excuse me, where can I make a remittance?

zh: 投资有风险，入市需谨慎。
en: Investing involves risks, and you should be cautious.

zh: 他把所有的积蓄都存进了银行。
en: He deposited all his savings into the bank.

zh: 你能借我一些钱吗？我下周还你。
en: Can you lend me some money? I'll pay you back next week.

zh: 这个月的利息已经到账了。
en: The interest for this month has been credited.

zh: 定期存款的利率更高。
en: Fixed deposits offer higher interest rates.

zh: 你的贷款申请被批准了。
en: Your loan application has been approved.

zh: 为什么我的账户被冻结了？
en: Why was my account frozen?

zh: 请在这里签名并填写日期。
en: Please sign here and fill in the date.

zh: 不要轻易相信高回报的理财广告。
en: Don't easily trust financial ads promising high returns.

zh: 他们正在考虑购买银行理财产品。
en: They are considering buying wealth management products from the bank.

zh: 你可以通过手机银行支付水电费。
en: You can pay utilities through mobile banking.

zh: 这家银行的客服态度很好。
en: The customer service at this bank is very friendly.

zh: 我正在攒钱旅行。
en: I am saving up for a trip.

zh: 请保持你的银行信息私密。
en: Please keep your banking information private.

zh: 这间公寓有一间卧室。
en: This apartment has one bedroom.

zh: 租金包含水电费吗？
en: Does the rent include utilities?

zh: 请准时交房租。
en: Please pay the rent on time.

zh: 虽然房租有点贵，但地理位置很好。
en: Although the rent is a bit expensive, the location is very good.

zh: 你能告诉我附近有没有超市吗？
en: Can you tell me if there is a supermarket nearby?

zh: 不允许养宠物。
en: Pets are not allowed.

zh: 我昨天签了租约。
en: I signed the lease yesterday.

zh: 我下个月会搬家。
en: I will move next month.

zh: 如果水管坏了，可以叫房东来修。
en: If the pipe is broken, you can call the landlord to fix it.

zh: 这间房子比那间大。
en: This house is bigger than that one.

zh: 你应该仔细检查合同。
en: You should read the contract carefully.

zh: 这个客厅真宽敞！
en: This living room is so spacious!

zh: 你难道不喜欢这个阳台吗？
en: Don't you like this balcony?

zh: 不要把垃圾放在走廊里。
en: Don't leave trash in the hallway.

zh: 什么时候可以入住？
en: When can I move in?

zh: 押金相当于一个月的租金。
en: The deposit is equivalent to one month's rent.

zh: 你能帮我搬一下家具吗？
en: Could you help me move the furniture?

zh: 这是最终的价格吗？
en: Is this the final price?

zh: 隔壁太吵了。
en: The neighbors are too noisy.

zh: 我打算合租以节省开支。
en: I plan to share a flat to save money.

zh: 厨房设备齐全。
en: The kitchen is fully equipped.

zh: 记得把钥匙还给房东。
en: Remember to return the keys to the landlord.

zh: 如果选择长租，可能有优惠。
en: If you choose a long-term lease, there might be a discount.

zh: 你找到合适的房子了吗？
en: Have you found a suitable place?

zh: 比如，地铁站就在步行五分钟内。
en: For example, the subway station is within a five-minute walk.

zh: 只要按时交租，就没问题。
en: As long as you pay the rent on time, it's fine.

zh: 房间稍微有点小，但很舒适。
en: The room is a bit small but very cozy.

zh: 不要在室内吸烟。
en: Don't smoke indoors.

zh: 我想知道物业费是多少。
en: I wonder how much the property management fee is.

zh: 这栋楼有电梯和安全门禁系统。
en: This building has an elevator and a security access system.

zh: 我每天都会刷新我的社交媒体 feed。
en: I refresh my social media feed every day.

zh: 你在 Instagram 上发照片了吗？
en: Did you post any photos on Instagram?

zh: 请帮我点赞这条动态。
en: Please like this post for me.

zh: 网络暴力是一种严重的社会问题。
en: Cyberbullying is a serious social problem.

zh: 别忘了关注我们的官方账号。
en: Don't forget to follow our official account.

zh: 这个视频在 YouTube 上很火。
en: This video is very popular on YouTube.

zh: 你为什么屏蔽了他？
en: Why did you block him?

zh: 请勿在评论区发布不当言论。
en: Please do not post inappropriate comments.

zh: 社交媒体让我们联系更紧密了。
en: Social media brings us closer together.

zh: 你在刷抖音吗？
en: Are you scrolling through TikTok?

zh: 我很久没更新主页了。
en: I haven't updated my profile for a long time.

zh: 这条推文被转发了上千次。
en: This tweet has been retweeted thousands of times.

zh: 你为什么不回我消息？
en: Why didn't you reply to my message?

zh: 点击这里查看最新动态。
en: Click here to see the latest updates.

zh: 网络诈骗越来越常见了。
en: Online scams are becoming more common.

zh: 你同意他的观点吗？
en: Do you agree with his point of view?

zh: 请用私信联系我。
en: Please contact me via direct message.

zh: 他昨天在脸书上分享了一篇文章。
en: He shared an article on Facebook yesterday.

zh: 你在哪个社交平台最活跃？
en: Which social platform are you most active on?

zh: 别忘了设置隐私权限。
en: Don't forget to set your privacy settings.

zh: 这个故事在微信朋友圈疯传。
en: This story went viral on WeChat Moments.

zh: 你关注了多少个账号？
en: How many accounts do you follow?

zh: 请给新视频点个赞。
en: Please give the new video a thumbs up.

zh: 我无法登录我的微博账号。
en: I can't log into my Weibo account.

zh: 你会因为网上的评论而生气吗？
en: Do you get angry because of online comments?

zh: 请勿传播虚假信息。
en: Do not spread false information.

zh: 社交媒体影响了我们的睡眠质量。
en: Social media affects our sleep quality.

zh: 你在直播吗？
en: Are you going live?

zh: 我决定退出所有社交群组。
en: I decided to leave all social groups.

zh: 请把这个帖子分享给你的朋友。
en: Please share this post with your friends.

zh: 我有一只猫。
en: I have a cat.

zh: 你的狗叫什么名字？
en: What is your dog's name?

zh: 请把猫粮放在碗里。
en: Please put the cat food in the bowl.

zh: 我的宠物兔子很喜欢吃胡萝卜。
en: My pet rabbit loves to eat carrots.

zh: 那只鸟会学人说话。
en: That bird can mimic human speech.

zh: 别让仓鼠跑出笼子。
en: Don't let the hamster escape from its cage.

zh: 她养了三只金鱼和一个乌龟。
en: She keeps three goldfish and a turtle.

zh: 为什么你的猫总是抓沙发？
en: Why does your cat always scratch the sofa?

zh: 带你的宠物去打个疫苗吧。
en: Take your pet to get vaccinated.

zh: 我家的鹦鹉能说你好。
en: My parrot can say hello.

zh: 你的豚鼠需要更大的笼子吗？
en: Does your guinea pig need a bigger cage?

zh: 每天给狗梳毛可以防止打结。
en: Brushing the dog every day prevents tangles.

zh: 这只流浪猫很怕人。
en: This stray cat is very afraid of people.

zh: 给猫咪准备一个舒适的窝很重要。
en: It is important to provide a cozy bed for the cat.

zh: 你最喜欢什么宠物？
en: What pet do you like the most?

zh: 我弟弟想要一条蛇当宠物。
en: My brother wants a snake as a pet.

zh: 请记得给仓鼠换水和加食物。
en: Please remember to change the hamster's water and add food.

zh: 兔子在草地上跳来跳去。
en: The rabbit is hopping around on the grass.

zh: 你周末会带狗去海边吗？
en: Will you take your dog to the beach on the weekend?

zh: 不要给狗吃巧克力，很危险。
en: Do not feed chocolate to dogs; it is dangerous.

zh: 她把流浪猫送到了动物收容所。
en: She took the stray cat to the animal shelter.

zh: 乌龟在水箱里游得很慢。
en: The turtle swims very slowly in the tank.

zh: 你的马平时吃什么饲料？
en: What kind of feed does your horse usually eat?

zh: 养宠物需要耐心和责任心。
en: Keeping a pet requires patience and responsibility.

zh: 我的狗一听到门铃就会叫。
en: My dog barks as soon as it hears the doorbell.

zh: 你能不能帮我照看一下我的猫？
en: Can you help me look after my cat?

zh: 这只蜥蜴需要加热灯来保持温暖。
en: This lizard needs a heat lamp to stay warm.

zh: 所有宠物都应该定期驱虫。
en: All pets should be dewormed regularly.

zh: 你的仓鼠晚上跑轮子会吵到你吗？
en: Does your hamster's running wheel bother you at night?

zh: 你喜欢下雨天吗？
en: Do you like rainy days?

zh: 请把垃圾分类。
en: Please sort the garbage.

zh: 秋天的时候，树叶会变成金黄色。
en: In autumn, the leaves turn golden yellow.

zh: 你知道怎么节约用水吗？
en: Do you know how to save water?

zh: 不要随意采摘花朵。
en: Don't pick flowers randomly.

zh: 森林里有很多野生动物。
en: There are many wild animals in the forest.

zh: 让我们一起种树吧。
en: Let's plant trees together.

zh: 空气污染对健康有害。
en: Air pollution is harmful to health.

zh: 你见过彩虹吗？
en: Have you ever seen a rainbow?

zh: 请关掉不用的灯。
en: Please turn off unnecessary lights.

zh: 海洋覆盖了地球表面的大部分。
en: The ocean covers most of the Earth's surface.

zh: 这些花在春天开放吗？
en: Do these flowers bloom in spring?

zh: 不要往河里扔垃圾。
en: Don't throw garbage into the river.

zh: 太阳能是一种清洁能源。
en: Solar energy is a clean energy source.

zh: 你会骑自行车去上班吗？
en: Do you ride a bike to work?

zh: 请使用环保购物袋。
en: Please use eco-friendly shopping bags.

zh: 每年有许多树木被砍伐。
en: Many trees are cut down every year.

zh: 为什么我们要保护濒危动物？
en: Why should we protect endangered animals?

zh: 不要把水龙头一直开着。
en: Don't leave the tap running.

zh: 闪电和雷声常常同时出现。
en: Lightning and thunder often occur together.

zh: 这棵橡树有多少年历史了？
en: How old is this oak tree?

zh: 请把纸张双面使用。
en: Please use both sides of the paper.

zh: 沙漠里的昼夜温差很大。
en: There is a huge temperature difference between day and night in the desert.

zh: 你听说过全球变暖吗？
en: Have you heard about global warming?

zh: 不要浪费食物。
en: Don't waste food.

zh: 候鸟每年都会迁徙到南方。
en: Migratory birds fly south every year.

zh: 我们可以做些什么来减少塑料垃圾？
en: What can we do to reduce plastic waste?

zh: 请记得随手关灯。
en: Remember to turn off the lights when you leave.

zh: 今天有什么新闻？
en: What's the news today?

zh: 总统刚刚发表了全国讲话。
en: The president just delivered a national address.

zh: 别相信那个谣言。
en: Don't believe that rumor.

zh: 新闻报道说台风即将登陆。
en: The news report says a typhoon is about to make landfall.

zh: 你对这次选举结果怎么看？
en: What do you think of the election results?

zh: 请把今天的报纸递给我。
en: Please pass me today's newspaper.

zh: 这场地震造成了严重破坏。
en: The earthquake caused severe damage.

zh: 快看，这条新闻是假的！
en: Look, this news is fake!

zh: 记者正在现场直播。
en: The reporter is broadcasting live on the scene.

zh: 油价又上涨了，你知道吗？
en: Oil prices have gone up again, did you know that?

zh: 政府宣布了新的经济政策。
en: The government announced a new economic policy.

zh: 别插播，让我听完天气预报。
en: Don't interrupt, let me finish listening to the weather forecast.

zh: 你能帮我翻译这篇新闻吗？
en: Can you help me translate this news article?

zh: 抗议者要求公平审判。
en: The protesters are demanding a fair trial.

zh: 点击这里查看最新头条。
en: Click here to view the latest headlines.

zh: 股市今天大幅下跌。
en: The stock market fell sharply today.

zh: 别忘了订阅我们的新闻简报。
en: Don't forget to subscribe to our newsletter.

zh: 这位科学家因发现疫苗获得诺贝尔奖。
en: The scientist won the Nobel Prize for discovering a vaccine.

zh: 明天的记者会几点开始？
en: What time does the press conference start tomorrow?

zh: 请保持安静，新闻正在播报。
en: Please keep quiet, the news is on.

zh: 警方逮捕了涉嫌诈骗的嫌疑人。
en: The police arrested the suspect suspected of fraud.

zh: 你对这个丑闻有什么看法？
en: What's your take on this scandal?

zh: 全球变暖已成为紧迫问题。
en: Global warming has become an urgent issue.

zh: 快打开电视，有一则紧急新闻。
en: Turn on the TV quickly, there's breaking news.

zh: 这家报社以深度调查闻名。
en: This newspaper is famous for its in-depth investigations.

zh: 别忘了核实信息来源。
en: Don't forget to verify the source of information.

zh: 奥运会开幕式吸引了全球观众。
en: The Olympic opening ceremony attracted a global audience.

zh: 为什么这则消息在社交媒体上疯传？
en: Why is this message going viral on social media?

zh: 根据最新报道，和平谈判取得进展。
en: According to the latest reports, peace talks have made progress.

zh: 你打算怎么实现你的目标？
en: How do you plan to achieve your goal?

zh: 制定一个详细的计划吧。
en: Make a detailed plan.

zh: 有时候梦想会改变。
en: Sometimes dreams change.

zh: 她想成为一名医生。
en: She wants to become a doctor.

zh: 我们得一步步来。
en: We need to take it step by step.

zh: 你的梦想是什么？
en: What is your dream?

zh: 每天都要朝着梦想前进。
en: Move toward your dream every day.

zh: 计划赶不上变化。
en: Plans can't keep up with changes.

zh: 他放弃了那个不切实际的幻想。
en: He gave up that unrealistic fantasy.

zh: 写下来会更容易记住。
en: Writing it down makes it easier to remember.

zh: 成功需要坚持不懈的努力。
en: Success requires persistent effort.

zh: 别让任何人偷走你的梦想。
en: Don't let anyone steal your dream.

zh: 我们什么时候开始行动？
en: When shall we start taking action?

zh: 这个计划听起来很不错。
en: This plan sounds really good.

zh: 倘若梦想没有翅膀，那就自己造一双。
en: If your dream has no wings, make a pair yourself.

zh: 她每周都会检查自己的进度。
en: She checks her progress every week.

zh: 你能描述一下你的长远规划吗？
en: Can you describe your long-term plan?

zh: 先从小目标开始吧。
en: Start with small goals first.

zh: 梦想总是美好的，但现实很骨感。
en: Dreams are always beautiful, but reality is harsh.

zh: 别害怕失败。
en: Don't be afraid of failure.

zh: 他计划在五年内开一家自己的店。
en: He plans to open his own shop within five years.

zh: 如果计划行不通，就换一个。
en: If the plan doesn't work, try another one.

zh: 你为什么选择这个职业？
en: Why did you choose this career?

zh: 保持积极的心态很重要。
en: It's important to keep a positive attitude.

zh: 我们需要更多的资源来实现这个项目。
en: We need more resources to realize this project.

zh: 她梦想环游世界。
en: She dreams of traveling around the world.

zh: 把你的计划写在一张纸上。
en: Write your plan on a piece of paper.

zh: 即使很困难，也不要放弃希望。
en: Even if it's tough, don't give up hope.

zh: 他终于实现了儿时的梦想。
en: He finally realized his childhood dream.

zh: 请进来坐坐。
en: Please come in and have a seat.

zh: 今天过得怎么样？
en: How's your day going?

zh: 代我向家人问好。
en: Say hello to your family for me.

zh: 你忙什么呢？
en: What are you up to?

zh: 周末愉快！
en: Have a nice weekend!

zh: 真巧，在这里碰到你。
en: What a coincidence running into you here.

zh: 你身体好吗？
en: Are you feeling well?

zh: 早点休息吧。
en: Get some rest early.

zh: 今天气温有点低，多穿点。
en: It's a bit cold today, dress warmly.

zh: 希望我们很快再见面。
en: Hope to see you again soon.

zh: 你的新发型真好看！
en: Your new hairstyle looks great!

zh: 别太累了，注意身体。
en: Don't overwork yourself, take care of your health.

zh: 你家人还好吧？
en: How is your family doing?

zh: 谢谢你的关心。
en: Thank you for your concern.

zh: 今天有什么计划？
en: What are your plans for today?

zh: 天气转凉了，保重。
en: The weather is getting cooler, take care.

zh: 这个多少钱？
en: How much is this?

zh: 太贵了。
en: It's too expensive.

zh: 能便宜点吗？
en: Can you make it cheaper?

zh: 我要买这个。
en: I want to buy this.

zh: 请给我收据。
en: Please give me the receipt.

zh: 你们有折扣吗？
en: Do you have any discounts?

zh: 这件衬衫打八折。
en: This shirt is 20% off.

zh: 我在找一双运动鞋。
en: I'm looking for a pair of sneakers.

zh: 这个有别的颜色吗？
en: Does this come in other colors?

zh: 我能试穿一下吗？
en: Can I try this on?

zh: 试衣间在哪儿？
en: Where is the fitting room?

zh: 这个尺寸太小了。
en: This size is too small.

zh: 我需要大一点的。
en: I need a bigger size.

zh: 这个质量很好。
en: This is of good quality.

zh: 那个更便宜。
en: That one is cheaper.

zh: 一共多少钱？
en: How much is it in total?

zh: 可以用信用卡吗？
en: Do you accept credit cards?

zh: 这个商品在打折。
en: This item is on sale.

zh: 原价是多少？
en: What's the original price?

zh: 这是一年一度的促销。
en: This is an annual promotion.

zh: 你推荐哪个？
en: Which one do you recommend?

zh: 我不太确定。
en: I'm not quite sure.

zh: 我们可以退换吗？
en: Can we return or exchange it?

zh: 保质期到什么时候？
en: What is the expiration date?

zh: 这个价格含税吗？
en: Does this price include tax?

zh: 我觉得这个价格合理。
en: I think this price is reasonable.

zh: 想买礼物送人。
en: I want to buy a gift for someone.

zh: 我们应该货比三家。
en: We should shop around.

zh: 我要一份牛排，五分熟。
en: I'd like a steak, medium rare.

zh: 这家餐厅的招牌菜是烤鸭。
en: The signature dish of this restaurant is roast duck.

zh: 我想点一份意大利面。
en: I'd like to order a pasta.

zh: 今天的例汤是什么？
en: What's the soup of the day?

zh: 能给我推荐一道菜吗？
en: Can you recommend a dish?

zh: 这道菜太辣了。
en: This dish is too spicy.

zh: 请帮我加一杯水。
en: Please bring me a glass of water.

zh: 我们两个人，要一张靠窗的桌子。
en: There are two of us, and we'd like a table by the window.

zh: 我不吃海鲜。
en: I don't eat seafood.

zh: 这道沙拉很新鲜。
en: This salad is very fresh.

zh: 你能把空调调低一点吗？
en: Could you turn down the air conditioner a bit?

zh: 我要结账。
en: I'd like the check, please.

zh: 请给我一碗米饭。
en: Please give me a bowl of rice.

zh: 你最喜欢哪道甜点？
en: Which dessert do you like best?

zh: 这家的披萨真好吃。
en: The pizza here is really delicious.

zh: 我可以换一道菜吗？
en: Can I change to another dish?

zh: 请等一会儿，我还没决定。
en: Please wait a moment, I haven't decided yet.

zh: 我们的账单分开发。
en: We'd like separate bills.

zh: 这个汤有点咸。
en: This soup is a bit salty.

zh: 服务员，再来一瓶啤酒。
en: Waiter, another bottle of beer, please.

zh: 这道菜需要多长时间？
en: How long will this dish take?

zh: 我要一份儿童套餐。
en: I'd like a kids' meal.

zh: 今天的鱼很新鲜。
en: Today's fish is very fresh.

zh: 我们想预订今晚七点的座位。
en: We'd like to reserve a table for 7 pm tonight.

zh: 这个甜点太好吃了，可以再来一份吗？
en: This dessert is so good; can I have another one?

zh: 麻烦给我一个打包盒。
en: Could you bring me a takeout box, please?

zh: 请问，火车站在哪里？
en: Excuse me, where is the train station?

zh: 直走然后右转就能看到博物馆。
en: Go straight and then turn right, you'll see the museum.

zh: 这附近有便宜的旅馆吗？
en: Are there any cheap hotels around here?

zh: 你可以坐地铁去机场。
en: You can take the subway to the airport.

zh: 麻烦告诉我怎么去最近的地铁站。
en: Could you tell me how to get to the nearest subway station?

zh: 沿着这条街走大约十分钟就到了。
en: Walk along this street for about ten minutes and you'll be there.

zh: 请问这个公交车去市中心吗？
en: Excuse me, does this bus go to the city center?

zh: 下车后你会看到一个大型购物中心。
en: After you get off, you'll see a large shopping mall.

zh: 抱歉，我迷路了。
en: Sorry, I'm lost.

zh: 你知道附近的卫生间在哪儿吗？
en: Do you know where the nearest restroom is?

zh: 请在这里左转。
en: Please turn left here.

zh: 走到第二个路口再问别人吧。
en: Walk to the second intersection and ask someone else.

zh: 离这里远吗？
en: Is it far from here?

zh: 大约需要步行二十分钟。
en: It takes about twenty minutes on foot.

zh: 这家餐厅的评价很好，我们去吧。
en: This restaurant has great reviews, let's go.

zh: 我建议你打车过去，比较快。
en: I suggest you take a taxi there, it's faster.

zh: 请带我去最近的酒店。
en: Please take me to the nearest hotel.

zh: 不好意思，请问这条街叫什么名字？
en: Excuse me, what's the name of this street?

zh: 你走错方向了，应该往回走。
en: You're going the wrong way; you should go back.

zh: 下一个路口右转就可以看到邮局。
en: Turn right at the next intersection and you'll see the post office.

zh: 我想去历史博物馆，坐几路车？
en: I want to go to the History Museum, which bus should I take?

zh: 别担心，我帮你查一下导航。
en: Don't worry, let me check the navigation for you.

zh: 这里距离海滩只有两公里。
en: It's only two kilometers from here to the beach.

zh: 请问这个位置是景点吗？
en: Excuse me, is this location a tourist attraction?

zh: 一直走到红绿灯那里过马路。
en: Keep walking until you reach the traffic lights, then cross the street.

zh: 你能说慢一点吗？我听不太懂。
en: Could you speak more slowly? I don't quite understand.

zh: 这张车票可以坐几次？
en: How many rides does this ticket cover?

zh: 旅途愉快！
en: Have a nice trip!

zh: 会议还有五分钟开始。
en: The meeting starts in five minutes.

zh: 你能把这份报告发给我吗？
en: Could you send me this report?

zh: 请关闭你的麦克风。
en: Please mute your microphone.

zh: 我不同意这个方案。
en: I disagree with this proposal.

zh: 我们换个时间再讨论吧。
en: Let's discuss it another time.

zh: 你需要准备一份演示文稿。
en: You need to prepare a presentation.

zh: 会议推迟到明天下午了。
en: The meeting has been postponed to tomorrow afternoon.

zh: 请大家在三点前回复。
en: Please reply by three o'clock.

zh: 有没有什么新进展？
en: Is there any progress?

zh: 我认为我们得加快进度。
en: I think we need to speed up.

zh: 请把屏幕共享打开。
en: Please share your screen.

zh: 这个数据来源可靠吗？
en: Is this data source reliable?

zh: 我们还有两个议题没讨论。
en: We still have two agenda items to discuss.

zh: 你把会议邀请发了吗？
en: Did you send the meeting invitation?

zh: 抱歉，我刚从另一个会议出来。
en: Sorry, I just got out of another meeting.

zh: 这份合同需要法务部审核。
en: This contract needs legal review.

zh: 你能讲慢一点吗？
en: Could you speak slower?

zh: 下周一的会议取消了。
en: The meeting next Monday is canceled.

zh: 我们先回顾一下上次的会议纪要。
en: Let's first review the minutes from last meeting.

zh: 还有什么补充意见吗？
en: Any additional comments?

zh: 请把文件上传到共享文件夹。
en: Please upload the file to the shared folder.

zh: 这个预算需要重新调整。
en: This budget needs to be adjusted.

zh: 今天会议就到这里。
en: That's all for today's meeting.

zh: 你能负责跟进这个客户吗？
en: Can you take responsibility for following up with this client?

zh: 我在等你的确认邮件。
en: I'm waiting for your confirmation email.

zh: 会议室的投影仪坏了。
en: The projector in the meeting room is broken.

zh: 我们最好提前五分钟入场。
en: We'd better enter the room five minutes early.

zh: 这个方案还需要再打磨一下。
en: This plan still needs some polishing.

zh: 我喜欢学习。
en: I like learning.

zh: 他每天上学。
en: He goes to school every day.

zh: 这是你的书吗？
en: Is this your book?

zh: 请打开课本。
en: Please open your textbook.

zh: 老师很有耐心。
en: The teacher is very patient.

zh: 你什么时候做作业？
en: When do you do your homework?

zh: 我们必须认真听讲。
en: We must listen carefully.

zh: 她正在复习功课。
en: She is reviewing her lessons.

zh: 数学很难，但很有趣。
en: Math is hard but interesting.

zh: 你能帮我解释这个单词吗？
en: Can you help me explain this word?

zh: 考试前要好好休息。
en: Get a good rest before the exam.

zh: 我正在学习英语语法。
en: I am learning English grammar.

zh: 教室里有三十个学生。
en: There are thirty students in the classroom.

zh: 你最喜欢哪个科目？
en: Which subject do you like best?

zh: 每天背诵生词很有用。
en: It is useful to memorize new words every day.

zh: 他把笔记借给了我。
en: He lent me his notes.

zh: 图书馆禁止大声喧哗。
en: Talking loudly is forbidden in the library.

zh: 你完成论文了吗？
en: Have you finished your essay?

zh: 多读课外书能开阔眼界。
en: Reading more extra-curricular books can broaden your horizons.

zh: 请在作业本上写上名字。
en: Please write your name on the homework book.

zh: 这次考试比上次容易。
en: This exam is easier than the last one.

zh: 他因为迟到被批评了。
en: He was criticized for being late.

zh: 我们明天举行演讲比赛。
en: We will hold a speech contest tomorrow.

zh: 你理解这个知识点了吗？
en: Do you understand this knowledge point?

zh: 学习语言需要不断练习。
en: Learning a language requires constant practice.

zh: 别忘记带字典来上课。
en: Don't forget to bring your dictionary to class.

zh: 她写作文时喜欢先用草稿。
en: She likes to write a draft before composing an essay.

zh: 为什么上课不能吃东西？
en: Why can't we eat in class?

zh: 学习与教育是改变命运的重要途径。
en: Learning and education are important ways to change one's destiny.

zh: 明天会下雨吗？
en: Will it rain tomorrow?

zh: 请带上雨伞。
en: Please bring an umbrella.

zh: 春天花开了。
en: Flowers bloom in spring.

zh: 夏天很热，我喜欢游泳。
en: Summer is hot, and I like swimming.

zh: 冬天常常下雪。
en: It often snows in winter.

zh: 昨天刮大风了。
en: There was a strong wind yesterday.

zh: 你喜欢哪个季节？
en: Which season do you like?

zh: 多穿点衣服，外面冷。
en: Wear more clothes, it's cold outside.

zh: 天气预报说今天有雷阵雨。
en: The weather forecast says there will be thunderstorms today.

zh: 这里的秋天非常凉爽。
en: Autumn here is very cool.

zh: 我们春天去野餐吧。
en: Let's go for a picnic in spring.

zh: 温度降到零下了。
en: The temperature dropped below zero.

zh: 要下雪了，快回家吧。
en: It's going to snow, hurry home.

zh: 夏天的夜晚星星很多。
en: There are many stars on summer nights.

zh: 你能告诉我明天天气怎么样吗？
en: Can you tell me what the weather will be like tomorrow?

zh: 今年冬天比去年冷。
en: This winter is colder than last year.

zh: 春雨贵如油。
en: Spring rain is as precious as oil.

zh: 别再下雨了，我都要发霉了。
en: Stop raining, I'm getting moldy.

zh: 大雪过后，整个世界都白了。
en: After the heavy snow, the whole world turned white.

zh: 今天有雾，开车小心。
en: It's foggy today, drive carefully.

zh: 你喜欢晴天还是阴天？
en: Do you prefer sunny days or cloudy days?

zh: 台风要来了，快做好准备。
en: A typhoon is coming, get prepared quickly.

zh: 夏天的傍晚去散步很舒服。
en: It's pleasant to take a walk on summer evenings.

zh: 冬天要记得戴手套和帽子。
en: Remember to wear gloves and a hat in winter.

zh: 这里的春天总是多雨。
en: Spring here is always rainy.

zh: 希望明天是个好天气。
en: I hope tomorrow will be fine weather.

zh: 我需要看医生。
en: I need to see a doctor.

zh: 他咳嗽得很厉害。
en: He is coughing badly.

zh: 这药一天吃两次。
en: Take this medicine twice a day.

zh: 你的血压正常。
en: Your blood pressure is normal.

zh: 我肚子疼。
en: I have a stomachache.

zh: 请按时服药。
en: Please take your medication on time.

zh: 她过敏了。
en: She is having an allergic reaction.

zh: 你需要做个检查。
en: You need to have a check-up.

zh: 我牙疼得厉害。
en: I have a terrible toothache.

zh: 你最近有没有受伤？
en: Have you been injured recently?

zh: 保持室内通风。
en: Keep the room well ventilated.

zh: 他的伤口感染了。
en: His wound got infected.

zh: 你打疫苗了吗？
en: Have you gotten the vaccine?

zh: 少熬夜，多休息。
en: Avoid staying up late and get more rest.

zh: 她骨折了，需要住院。
en: She broke a bone and needs to be hospitalized.

zh: 这药有副作用吗？
en: Does this medicine have side effects?

zh: 我喉咙痛。
en: I have a sore throat.

zh: 你最好戒烟。
en: You'd better quit smoking.

zh: 医生说我贫血。
en: The doctor said I have anemia.

zh: 我们什么时候能拿化验结果？
en: When can we get the test results?

zh: 我每天早上慢跑。
en: I go jogging every morning.

zh: 你吃过早饭了吗？
en: Have you had breakfast?

zh: 请在这张表格上签名。
en: Please sign this form.

zh: 她手术后恢复得很好。
en: She is recovering well after the surgery.

zh: 我爱你，妈妈。
en: I love you, Mom.

zh: 爸爸今天下班早。
en: Dad came home early from work today.

zh: 你周末回家吃饭吗？
en: Are you coming home for dinner this weekend?

zh: 记得给奶奶打个电话。
en: Remember to call Grandma.

zh: 姐姐总是帮我复习功课。
en: My sister always helps me with my homework.

zh: 弟弟在客厅里玩积木。
en: My little brother is playing with blocks in the living room.

zh: 爷爷喜欢在院子里晒太阳。
en: Grandpa enjoys sitting in the yard and soaking up the sun.

zh: 妈妈做的红烧肉最好吃。
en: The braised pork my mom makes is the best.

zh: 你们一家人真幸福。
en: Your family is truly happy.

zh: 别对妹妹那么凶。
en: Don't be so harsh with your sister.

zh: 我们每年春节都拍全家福。
en: We take a family photo every Chinese New Year.

zh: 你能帮我照看一下侄子吗？
en: Can you keep an eye on my nephew?

zh: 姑姑从国外寄来了礼物。
en: Aunt sent a gift from abroad.

zh: 舅舅是个幽默的人。
en: Uncle is a humorous person.

zh: 外婆的怀抱最温暖。
en: Grandma's arms are the warmest.

zh: 你怎么还不结婚？
en: Why aren't you married yet?

zh: 家人就是彼此的依靠。
en: Family members rely on each other.

zh: 给爸爸倒杯茶。
en: Pour Dad a cup of tea.

zh: 妈妈，我想学做饺子。
en: Mom, I want to learn how to make dumplings.

zh: 妹妹在学钢琴，每天练很久。
en: My sister is learning piano and practices for hours every day.

zh: 无论发生什么，家永远是你的港湾。
en: No matter what happens, home will always be your safe harbor.

zh: 你们父子俩长得真像。
en: You and your father look so alike.

zh: 别让父母为你担心。
en: Don't let your parents worry about you.

zh: 我女儿今天第一次叫爸爸。
en: My daughter said 'Dada' for the first time today.

zh: 陪妈妈去市场买菜吧。
en: Come with Mom to the market to buy groceries.

zh: 孩子，你长大了。
en: My child, you've grown up.

zh: 一家人在一起就是最大的幸福。
en: The greatest happiness is being together as a family.

zh: 你能教我做你妈妈的拿手菜吗？
en: Can you teach me your mom's signature dish?

zh: 爸爸，我这次考试进步了。
en: Dad, I did better on this exam.

zh: 亲情就像一盏灯，永远照亮回家的路。
en: Family love is like a lamp, always lighting the way home.

zh: 别难过了，一切都会好起来的。
en: Don't be sad, everything will be fine.

zh: 他看上去有点焦虑。
en: He looks a bit anxious.

zh: 我忍不住笑了起来。
en: I couldn't help laughing.

zh: 她为什么生气？
en: Why is she angry?

zh: 请保持冷静。
en: Please stay calm.

zh: 听到这个消息，我震惊得说不出话。
en: I was so shocked that I couldn't speak when I heard the news.

zh: 你最近压力大吗？
en: Have you been under a lot of stress lately?

zh: 我有点失落。
en: I feel a little lost.

zh: 他的眼神里充满了悲伤。
en: His eyes were full of sadness.

zh: 别再哭了。
en: Stop crying.

zh: 她突然变得很兴奋。
en: She suddenly became very excited.

zh: 你对这次旅行期待吗？
en: Are you looking forward to the trip?

zh: 我感到无比自豪。
en: I feel incredibly proud.

zh: 他藏在愤怒背后的其实是恐惧。
en: What he hides behind his anger is actually fear.

zh: 笑一笑，你会感觉好一点。
en: Smile, and you'll feel better.

zh: 我的心跳得很快。
en: My heart is beating fast.

zh: 你害怕一个人待着吗？
en: Are you afraid of being alone?

zh: 终于结束了，我松了一口气。
en: It's finally over, and I breathed a sigh of relief.

zh: 别把情绪都憋在心里。
en: Don't bottle up all your emotions.

zh: 他感到既兴奋又紧张。
en: He felt both excited and nervous.

zh: 她到底在生什么气？
en: What on earth is she angry about?

zh: 我猜你现在很失望。
en: I guess you're very disappointed right now.

zh: 他的笑容像阳光一样温暖。
en: His smile is as warm as sunshine.

zh: 你为什么不早点告诉我？
en: Why didn't you tell me earlier?

zh: 我完全被你感动了。
en: I'm completely moved by you.

zh: 有时候，沉默比话语更有力。
en: Sometimes silence is more powerful than words.

zh: 我希望你今晚能睡个好觉。
en: I hope you can have a good sleep tonight.

zh: 我每天都会用电脑工作。
en: I use the computer to work every day.

zh: 你能帮我修一下这台电脑吗？
en: Can you help me fix this computer?

zh: 请关闭显示器再离开。
en: Please turn off the monitor before you leave.

zh: 这台笔记本电脑的电池续航很好。
en: This laptop has great battery life.

zh: 你知道怎么重置密码吗？
en: Do you know how to reset the password?

zh: 文件已经上传到云端了。
en: The file has been uploaded to the cloud.

zh: 先保存你的工作，然后再关机。
en: Save your work first, then shut down the computer.

zh: 新买的固态硬盘速度非常快。
en: The new SSD is extremely fast.

zh: 为什么你的电脑运行这么慢？
en: Why is your computer running so slowly?

zh: 别忘记定期更新杀毒软件。
en: Don't forget to update the antivirus software regularly.

zh: 我需要一根USB转HDMI的线。
en: I need a USB to HDMI cable.

zh: 他把所有数据都备份到了移动硬盘上。
en: He backed up all the data to an external hard drive.

zh: 请确保网络连接稳定后再开始下载。
en: Make sure the internet connection is stable before you start downloading.

zh: 这台电脑的硬件配置是什么？
en: What are the hardware specifications of this computer?

zh: 键盘上有些按键失灵了。
en: Some keys on the keyboard are not working.

zh: 我们可以用远程桌面来协助你。
en: We can use remote desktop to assist you.

zh: 你安装最新版的驱动程序了吗？
en: Have you installed the latest driver?

zh: 尽量不要在电脑旁边吃喝东西。
en: Try not to eat or drink near the computer.

zh: 这个软件可以自动修复常见的系统错误。
en: This software can automatically fix common system errors.

zh: 把图片压缩一下再发给客户。
en: Compress the image before sending it to the client.

zh: 为什么打印机老是显示脱机？
en: Why does the printer always show offline?

zh: 我习惯使用双显示器来提高效率。
en: I prefer using dual monitors to boost productivity.

zh: 请重启路由器来解决网络延迟问题。
en: Please restart the router to fix the network lag.

zh: 他正在学习如何编写Python程序。
en: He is learning how to write Python programs.

zh: 手机和电脑之间可以无线传输文件。
en: Files can be transferred wirelessly between the phone and the computer.

zh: 这个病毒会窃取你的个人信息。
en: This virus can steal your personal information.

zh: 你用的是Windows还是macOS？
en: Do you use Windows or macOS?

zh: 按Ctrl+S可以快速保存文档。
en: Press Ctrl+S to quickly save the document.

zh: 我在电脑上安装了一个虚拟机来测试软件。
en: I installed a virtual machine on the computer to test software.

zh: 请把鼠标垫放在干净平整的桌面上。
en: Place the mouse pad on a clean and flat desk.

zh: 我每天早上跑步半小时。
en: I jog for half an hour every morning.

zh: 请举起哑铃，保持背部挺直。
en: Lift the dumbbells and keep your back straight.

zh: 他昨天在公园打了一小时篮球。
en: He played basketball in the park for an hour yesterday.

zh: 做瑜伽能提高柔韧性和平衡感。
en: Doing yoga can improve flexibility and balance.

zh: 你今天感觉肌肉酸痛吗？
en: Do you feel sore muscles today?

zh: 开始运动前一定要热身。
en: Always warm up before exercising.

zh: 她每周去上三次普拉提课。
en: She attends Pilates class three times a week.

zh: 登山机比跑步机更锻炼大腿。
en: The stair climber works your thighs more than the treadmill.

zh: 你们队赢得了上周的足球赛吗？
en: Did your team win the football match last week?

zh: 别忘记补充水分，运动时要小口喝水。
en: Don’t forget to stay hydrated; sip water during exercise.

zh: 引体向上能有效增强上肢力量。
en: Pull-ups effectively build upper body strength.

zh: 他每天做一百个俯卧撑。
en: He does a hundred push-ups every day.

zh: 你更喜欢户外运动还是室内训练？
en: Do you prefer outdoor sports or indoor training?

zh: 快走对膝盖的冲击比跑步小。
en: Brisk walking has less impact on your knees than running.

zh: 请把瑜伽垫铺平，开始下一个动作。
en: Lay your yoga mat flat and start the next pose.

zh: 她通过跳绳来提高心肺功能。
en: She uses jump rope to improve her cardiovascular fitness.

zh: 为什么运动后要做拉伸？
en: Why is it important to stretch after exercise?

zh: 你今天的热量消耗达标了吗？
en: Have you met your calorie burn goal today?

zh: 举重时注意呼吸，不要憋气。
en: Focus on your breathing when lifting weights; don’t hold your breath.

zh: 晨练有助于一整天都保持精力充沛。
en: Morning exercise helps keep you energetic all day.

zh: 你多久做一次力量训练？
en: How often do you do strength training?

zh: 动感单车课能燃烧大量卡路里。
en: A spinning class can burn a lot of calories.

zh: 我昨天试了新的健身App，感觉不错。
en: I tried a new fitness app yesterday; it felt great.

zh: 下雨天你会在室内做什么运动？
en: What exercise do you do indoors on rainy days?

zh: 平板支撑能锻炼核心肌群。
en: Planks strengthen your core muscles.

zh: 请保持这个姿势十五秒，然后放松。
en: Hold this position for fifteen seconds, then relax.

zh: 运动后洗个热水澡可以缓解疲劳。
en: Taking a hot shower after exercise can relieve fatigue.

zh: 现在几点了？
en: What time is it?

zh: 会议两点开始。
en: The meeting starts at two.

zh: 请准时到达。
en: Please arrive on time.

zh: 我们明天上午九点见面好吗？
en: Shall we meet at nine tomorrow morning?

zh: 把截止日期记在日历上。
en: Mark the deadline on your calendar.

zh: 我周五下午有空。
en: I'm free on Friday afternoon.

zh: 你能再安排一次会议吗？
en: Can you reschedule the meeting?

zh: 他迟到了十分钟。
en: He was ten minutes late.

zh: 我们得加快进度赶最后期限。
en: We need to speed up to meet the deadline.

zh: 你的日程表上还有什么其他安排？
en: What else do you have on your schedule?

zh: 请把报告在周五之前交上来。
en: Please submit the report by Friday.

zh: 这个项目预计要花三周时间。
en: This project is expected to take three weeks.

zh: 你介意我们把会议推迟到下午三点吗？
en: Would you mind if we postpone the meeting to 3 p.m.?

zh: 我们的时间不多了，赶紧做完。
en: We're running out of time, let's finish it quickly.

zh: 我八点到办公室，但会议九点才开始。
en: I arrived at the office at eight, but the meeting didn't start until nine.

zh: 你能告诉我完整的行程安排吗？
en: Can you tell me the full itinerary?

zh: 别迟到，否则我们会错过航班。
en: Don't be late, or we'll miss the flight.

zh: 这个时间适合你吗？
en: Does this time work for you?

zh: 我建议我们把截止日期延后一周。
en: I suggest we extend the deadline by a week.

zh: 午餐时间通常在中午十二点到一点之间。
en: Lunchtime is usually between 12 p.m. and 1 p.m.

zh: 你打算在这个周末完成什么？
en: What do you plan to accomplish this weekend?

zh: 我们应该在出发前留出半小时缓冲时间。
en: We should allow half an hour of buffer time before we leave.

zh: 如果提前出发，能避开交通高峰。
en: If we leave early, we can avoid rush hour traffic.

zh: 请确认明天的预约时间。
en: Please confirm the appointment time for tomorrow.

zh: 我整个下午都在开会，没空接电话。
en: I'll be in meetings all afternoon and won't be able to take calls.

zh: 你能把日程表发给我吗？
en: Can you send me the schedule?

zh: 把这件事排在优先事项的首位。
en: Put this at the top of your priority list.

zh: 她每天晚上花一个小时运动。
en: She spends an hour exercising every evening.

zh: 我们的时间安排可能有冲突。
en: Our schedules might conflict.

zh: 如果一切按计划进行，我们将在下周三完成。
en: If everything goes according to plan, we'll finish by next Wednesday.

zh: 公共汽车来了吗？
en: Is the bus coming?

zh: 地铁站离这里不远。
en: The subway station is not far from here.

zh: 绿灯亮了，可以走了。
en: The light is green, you can go.

zh: 出租车在路边等着。
en: The taxi is waiting by the roadside.

zh: 火车晚点了十分钟。
en: The train is ten minutes late.

zh: 你能告诉我最近的地铁入口在哪吗？
en: Can you tell me where the nearest subway entrance is?

zh: 骑摩托车要戴头盔。
en: You must wear a helmet when riding a motorcycle.

zh: 我更喜欢坐高铁旅行。
en: I prefer traveling by high-speed rail.

zh: 开车时不要打电话。
en: Don't use your phone while driving.

zh: 这趟航班几点起飞？
en: What time does this flight take off?

zh: 步行到公园大约需要二十分钟。
en: It takes about twenty minutes to walk to the park.

zh: 请在黄线后等待。
en: Please wait behind the yellow line.

zh: 下一站是市中心。
en: The next stop is the city center.

zh: 你需要转乘三号线。
en: You need to transfer to Line 3.

zh: 先下后上，注意安全。
en: Let passengers off first, then board, and mind the gap.

zh: 这条路限速每小时六十公里。
en: The speed limit on this road is 60 kilometers per hour.

zh: 票多少钱一张？
en: How much is a ticket?

zh: 请把行李放在行李架上。
en: Please put your luggage on the rack.

zh: 飞机即将起飞，请关闭电子设备。
en: The plane is about to take off, please turn off electronic devices.

zh: 我赶时间，能开快一点吗？
en: I'm in a hurry, can you drive a little faster?

zh: 注意前方有行人过马路。
en: Watch out for pedestrians crossing the road ahead.

zh: 这辆公交车开往火车站吗？
en: Does this bus go to the train station?

zh: 我走路去超市只需要五分钟。
en: It only takes me five minutes to walk to the supermarket.

zh: 请系好安全带，我们要出发了。
en: Fasten your seatbelt, we're about to leave.

zh: 在十字路口右转。
en: Turn right at the intersection.

zh: 你的车停在哪了？
en: Where did you park your car?

zh: 请稍等一下，我马上接电话。
en: Please hold on, I'll answer the phone right away.

zh: 你能听清我说话吗？
en: Can you hear me clearly?

zh: 我给你回电话。
en: I'll call you back.

zh: 对不起，我打错电话了。
en: Sorry, I dialed the wrong number.

zh: 你正在通话中吗？
en: Are you on the phone?

zh: 这个电话线路不太好。
en: The phone line is not very good.

zh: 让我把电话转给经理。
en: Let me transfer the call to the manager.

zh: 你方便现在说话吗？
en: Is it convenient for you to talk now?

zh: 请别挂断。
en: Please don't hang up.

zh: 我明天上午会给你打电话。
en: I will give you a call tomorrow morning.

zh: 你能大声一点吗？我听不太清楚。
en: Could you speak up? I can't hear you very well.

zh: 请把电话号码告诉我。
en: Please tell me your phone number.

zh: 他正在接另一通电话。
en: He is on another call right now.

zh: 你的电话响了。
en: Your phone is ringing.

zh: 请问你找谁？
en: May I ask who you are looking for?

zh: 我们通话突然中断了。
en: Our call was suddenly cut off.

zh: 我不小心按到了静音。
en: I accidentally pressed the mute button.

zh: 请把会议时间通过电话告诉我。
en: Please inform me of the meeting time by phone.

zh: 你手机还有电吗？
en: Does your phone still have battery?

zh: 请直接打我的手机号码。
en: Please call my mobile number directly.

zh: 你记得我们的通话内容吗？
en: Do you remember what we talked about on the phone?

zh: 对不起，我这边信号很差。
en: Sorry, the signal here is very poor.

zh: 你可以把免提打开吗？
en: Could you turn on the speakerphone?

zh: 谢谢你这么快回我电话。
en: Thank you for returning my call so quickly.

zh: 请在听到提示音后留言。
en: Please leave a message after the beep.

zh: 我喜欢读书。
en: I like reading.

zh: 他每天跑步一小时。
en: He runs for an hour every day.

zh: 让我们一起画画吧！
en: Let's draw together!

zh: 她热衷于收集邮票。
en: She is passionate about collecting stamps.

zh: 你对摄影感兴趣吗？
en: Are you interested in photography?

zh: 周末我常去爬山。
en: I often go hiking on weekends.

zh: 烹饪是我最大的乐趣。
en: Cooking is my greatest pleasure.

zh: 他为什么喜欢钓鱼？
en: Why does he like fishing?

zh: 我们一起去游泳吧。
en: Let's go swimming together.

zh: 她正在学弹钢琴。
en: She is learning to play the piano.

zh: 他几乎每天都要打篮球。
en: He plays basketball almost every day.

zh: 你最近在练什么乐器？
en: What instrument are you practicing these days?

zh: 请别把颜料弄到地上。

en: Which festival is your favorite? Why?

en: Wish you a happy holiday and all the best!

en: My bank card was swallowed by the ATM.

en: Can you pay the credit card bill on mobile banking?

en: I forgot my online banking login password.

en: The bank teller suggested I buy an investment insurance.

en: I have three automatic deductions this month.

en: You can set up account balance alerts.

en: Remember to bring your ID when going to the bank.

en: He transferred five hundred yuan to me via mobile banking.

en: This apartment is big.

en: The rent is too expensive.

zh: 你什么时候搬进来？
en: When are you moving in?

en: Please pay one month's deposit first.

en: Is there an elevator in the building?

en: The kitchen is well-equipped.

en: The neighbors are very quiet.

en: This bedroom gets plenty of sunlight.

en: Can you show me the apartment?

en: Are water and electricity bills included in the rent?

en: The washing machine is broken and needs to be fixed.

en: Don't keep any pets.

en: It's only a five-minute walk to the subway station.

zh: 这栋房子建于2010年。
en: This house was built in 2010.

zh: 你打算租期多久？
en: How long do you plan to rent?

zh: 合同到期后可以续租。
en: You can renew the lease after it expires.

zh: 壁橱空间很大。
en: There is a lot of closet space.

en: The landlord is very friendly.

zh: 把钥匙交给管理员。
en: Give the keys to the building manager.

zh: 月租金不包括暖气费。
en: The monthly rent doesn't include heating fees.

zh: 我明天来签合同。
en: I will come tomorrow to sign the contract.

zh: 这件家具可以保留吗？
en: Can this piece of furniture stay?

en: Are there parking spaces downstairs?

en: Tenants need to pay for internet themselves.

zh: 这间房子朝南，冬暖夏凉。
en: This apartment faces south, warm in winter and cool in summer.

zh: 晚上十点后请不要大声喧哗。
en: Please don't make loud noise after 10 p.m.

zh: 搬走前要提前一个月通知房东。
en: You must inform the landlord one month before moving out.

en: Let's take care of the Earth together.

en: Fake news on social media is misleading the public.

en: Both sides of the conflict have agreed to hold peace talks tomorrow.

en: Do you think this summit can reach a substantive agreement?

en: Many flights have been canceled or delayed due to extreme weather.

en: Do you support this new policy?

en: Tune in to tonight's special report for more details.

en: This newspaper is known for its in-depth investigative reporting.

en: Where did this news come from?

en: Please verify the source before sharing the news.

en: The local TV station is broadcasting the latest developments of the fire live.

zh: 多么精彩的报道啊！

en: What is your opinion on the sharp drop in Bitcoin prices?

en: Please pay attention to official information.

en: A new study shows that climate change is happening faster than previously expected.

zh: 这次会议什么时候开始？

en: The president emphasized the importance of education reform in yesterday's speech.

en: After reading this report, please write down your thoughts.

en: You need to set a goal first.

en: My plan is to learn swimming this year.

en: Why is your dream so important?

en: She plans to study abroad next year.

en: Follow your dream bravely!

en: I accumulate knowledge every day to realize my dream.

en: He adjusted his plan to adapt to the new situation.

en: Can you give me some advice on the plan?

en: Don't just daydream, take action!
