zh: 我们应该定期回顾自己的计划。
en: We should regularly review our plans.

zh: 没有计划的目标只是愿望。
en: A goal without a plan is just a wish.

zh: 你相信梦想会实现吗？
en: Do you believe that dreams can come true?

zh: 一步步来，别着急。
en: Take it step by step, don't rush.

zh: 最近怎么样？
en: How have you been lately?

zh: 好久不见。
en: Long time no see.

zh: 工作还顺利吗？
en: Is everything going well at work?

zh: 别忘了带伞，今天可能下雨。
en: Don't forget your umbrella; it might rain today.

zh: 你最近在忙什么？
en: What have you been busy with lately?

zh: 很高兴认识你。
en: Nice to meet you.

zh: 请代我向你家人问好。
en: Please say hello to your family for me.

zh: 我很好，谢谢关心。
en: I'm fine, thank you for asking.

zh: 休息一下吧，别太累了。
en: Take a break; don't work too hard.

zh: 你看起来有点疲惫，没事吧？
en: You look a bit tired; are you okay?

zh: 你最近有去旅行吗？
en: Have you traveled recently?

zh: 记得多穿点，外面很冷。
en: Remember to wear more; it's cold outside.

zh: 你气色真好。
en: You have a great complexion.

zh: 明天有空一起吃饭吗？
en: Are you free to have dinner together tomorrow?

zh: 抱歉，我迟到了。
en: Sorry, I'm late.

zh: 路上小心，到家给我发个消息。
en: Take care on the road; text me when you get home.

zh: 你最近在看什么书？
en: What book are you reading lately?

zh: 祝你一天好心情。
en: Wish you a great day.

zh: 有什么新鲜事吗？
en: What's new with you?

zh: 这个苹果多少钱？
en: How much is this apple?

zh: 我想买两公斤大米。
en: I'd like to buy two kilograms of rice.

zh: 这件衬衫打八折吗？
en: Is this shirt 20% off?

zh: 请给我拿个小号的。
en: Please get me a small size.

zh: 这里的商品质量很好。
en: The products here are of good quality.

zh: 你昨天买的裙子花了多少钱？
en: How much did you spend on the dress you bought yesterday?

zh: 别买那个，它不划算。
en: Don't buy that; it's not a good deal.

zh: 我们能刷卡吗？
en: Can we pay by card?

zh: 这个价格包括税吗？
en: Does this price include tax?

zh: 我通常在网上购物，因为更便宜。
en: I usually shop online because it's cheaper.

zh: 这件外套原价五百元，现在只要三百元。
en: This coat was originally 500 yuan, but now it's only 300.

zh: 你要现金还是刷卡？
en: Would you like to pay in cash or by card?

zh: 本周所有鞋子都半价出售。
en: All shoes are half price this week.

zh: 这个冰箱的能耗等级是多少？
en: What is the energy rating of this refrigerator?

zh: 我们买一送一。
en: We have a buy-one-get-one-free offer.

zh: 你能帮我比较一下这两款手机的价格吗？
en: Can you help me compare the prices of these two phones?

zh: 打折季快到了，我要等一等再买。
en: The sale season is coming; I'll wait before buying.

zh: 这个面包是今天生产的吗？
en: Is this bread made today?

zh: 请给我三个面包和一瓶牛奶。
en: Please give me three loaves of bread and a bottle of milk.

zh: 我预算有限，只能买最便宜的款式。
en: I have a limited budget, so I can only buy the cheapest model.

zh: 你们有会员折扣吗？
en: Do you offer a membership discount?

zh: 这个颜色不适合你，试试那个蓝色的。
en: This color doesn't suit you; try that blue one.

zh: 网上买这个电子产品比实体店便宜很多。
en: Buying this electronic product online is much cheaper than in the physical store.

zh: 你对价格有什么疑问吗？
en: Do you have any questions about the price?

zh: 别忘了我需要你帮我带一瓶酱油。
en: Don't forget I need you to bring me a bottle of soy sauce.

zh: 这个包包是限量版吗？
en: Is this bag a limited edition?

zh: 由于促销，所有库存都降价百分之十。
en: Due to the promotion, all stock is reduced by 10 percent.

zh: 请告诉我总价是多少。
en: Please tell me what the total price is.

zh: 我要一杯水。
en: I'd like a glass of water.

zh: 你们有什么推荐的菜吗？
en: What do you recommend?

zh: 这个菜很辣吗？
en: Is this dish very spicy?

zh: 我想要一份沙拉作为前菜。
en: I'll have a salad as a starter.

zh: 牛排要五分熟。
en: I'd like my steak medium rare.

zh: 你们这里有素食选项吗？
en: Do you have any vegetarian options?

zh: 甜点菜单能给我看看吗？
en: Could I see the dessert menu?

zh: 这道意大利面味道很好。
en: This pasta tastes great.

zh: 麻烦结账。
en: Check, please.

zh: 我们想分开付。
en: We'd like to pay separately.

zh: 茶是免费续杯的吗？
en: Is the tea free refill?

zh: 你能推荐一款甜白葡萄酒吗？
en: Can you recommend a sweet white wine?

zh: 我想预订今晚七点的座位。
en: I'd like to make a reservation for 7 pm tonight.

zh: 我们点的菜还没来。
en: Our order hasn't arrived yet.

zh: 这份量挺大的。
en: The portion is quite large.

zh: 我需要一个儿童座椅。
en: I need a high chair for the child.

zh: 你对虾过敏吗？
en: Are you allergic to shrimp?

zh: 请不要放香菜。
en: Please leave out the cilantro.

zh: 他们的招牌菜是什么？
en: What's their signature dish?

zh: 再给我来一杯咖啡。
en: I'll have another cup of coffee.

zh: 这家餐厅环境真不错。
en: The atmosphere of this restaurant is really nice.

zh: 我想试一下今天的特价菜。
en: I'd like to try today's special.

zh: 你们的营业时间是多少？
en: What are your business hours?

zh: 这个菜里有花生吗？
en: Does this dish contain peanuts?

zh: 我们两个人，能安排靠窗的座位吗？
en: We are two; could we have a table by the window?

zh: 请把剩下的打包。
en: Please pack the leftovers to go.

zh: 服务员，我的叉子掉了。
en: Waiter, I dropped my fork.

zh: 请问去火车站怎么走？
en: Excuse me, how can I get to the train station?

zh: 沿着这条街直走，然后在第二个路口右转。
en: Go straight along this street and turn right at the second intersection.

zh: 这里离地铁站远吗？
en: Is it far from here to the subway station?

zh: 我需要坐公交车还是走路？
en: Should I take a bus or walk?

zh: 这附近有没有好的餐馆？
en: Are there any good restaurants around here?

zh: 一直走到红绿灯处，然后过马路。
en: Keep walking until you see the traffic lights, then cross the street.

zh: 对不起，我也是游客，不知道路。
en: Sorry, I'm a tourist too. I don't know the way.

zh: 向左拐，你会看到一栋蓝色的大楼。
en: Turn left, and you'll see a big blue building.

zh: 坐地铁三号线到市中心站下车。
en: Take Line 3 of the subway and get off at the City Center station.

zh: 你要去的地方离这里大约十分钟路程。
en: The place you're going to is about a ten-minute walk from here.

zh: 你能用英语指路吗？
en: Can you give directions in English?

zh: 穿过这个公园，你就能看到博物馆了。
en: Go through this park, and you'll see the museum.

zh: 最近的公共厕所在哪里？
en: Where is the nearest public restroom?

zh: 请一直往前开，直到看见加油站。
en: Please drive straight ahead until you see a gas station.

zh: 这条路会直接带你到海滩。
en: This road will take you directly to the beach.

zh: 你要坐哪一路公交车？
en: Which bus do you need to take?

zh: 从这里到机场大概需要一个小时。
en: It takes about an hour to get to the airport from here.

zh: 别忘了在售票处买票。
en: Don't forget to buy a ticket at the ticket office.

zh: 你可以乘坐观光巴士游览城市。
en: You can take a sightseeing bus to tour the city.

zh: 这家酒店离历史中心很近。
en: This hotel is very close to the historic center.

zh: 请在下一个路口左转。
en: Please turn left at the next intersection.

zh: 我可以用手机导航一下吗？
en: Can I use my phone to navigate?

zh: 你确定这条路是对的吗？
en: Are you sure this is the right way?

zh: 我们最好问一下当地人。
en: We'd better ask a local person.

zh: 非常感谢你的帮助。
en: Thank you very much for your help.

zh: 注意安全，祝旅途愉快！
en: Be safe and have a nice trip!

zh: 会议将在下午三点开始。
en: The meeting will start at 3 PM.

zh: 请把这份报告复印五份。
en: Please make five copies of this report.

zh: 我们需要讨论一下预算问题。
en: We need to discuss the budget issues.

zh: 谁负责记录会议纪要？
en: Who is responsible for taking the meeting minutes?

zh: 你能把投影仪打开吗？
en: Could you turn on the projector?

zh: 会议推迟到明天上午了。
en: The meeting has been postponed to tomorrow morning.

zh: 请在周五之前提交你的进度报告。
en: Please submit your progress report by Friday.

zh: 这个项目的截止日期是什么时候？
en: What is the deadline for this project?

zh: 我们需要在下一季度提升销售额。
en: We need to increase sales in the next quarter.

zh: 让我来总结一下刚才的讨论。
en: Let me summarize the discussion we just had.

zh: 你还有什么要补充的吗？
en: Do you have anything else to add?

zh: 请把手机调成静音模式。
en: Please put your phone on silent mode.

zh: 客户对上次的方案不满意。
en: The client was not satisfied with the last proposal.

zh: 我们最好先确定一下优先级。
en: We'd better set the priorities first.

zh: 这个会议要开多长时间？
en: How long is this meeting going to last?

zh: 请大家针对这个问题提出建议。
en: Everyone, please give your suggestions on this issue.

zh: 我认为这个想法值得考虑。
en: I think this idea is worth considering.

zh: 你能把文件共享到群里吗？
en: Could you share the file in the group?

zh: 让我们进入下一个议程。
en: Let's move on to the next agenda item.

zh: 这个月的业绩目标达成了吗？
en: Have we achieved this month's performance targets?

zh: 请确保所有数据都准确无误。
en: Please make sure all data is accurate.

zh: 谁有不同意见？
en: Who has a different opinion?

zh: 会议记录会通过邮件发送给大家。
en: The meeting minutes will be emailed to everyone.

zh: 我们需要尽快解决这个技术问题。
en: We need to resolve this technical issue as soon as possible.

zh: 你可以简单描述一下你的方案吗？
en: Can you briefly describe your plan?

zh: 我提议成立一个专项小组来跟进。
en: I propose setting up a special task force to follow up.

zh: 不要在会议上使用手机。
en: Don't use your phone during the meeting.

zh: 最终决定会在下周一公布。
en: The final decision will be announced next Monday.

zh: 老师正在黑板上写字。
en: The teacher is writing on the blackboard.

zh: 你能帮我解答这道数学题吗？
en: Can you help me solve this math problem?

zh: 请打开书本翻到第20页。
en: Please open your books to page 20.

zh: 她每天花一个小时练习钢琴。
en: She practices the piano for an hour every day.

zh: 教育是改变世界的最强大武器。
en: Education is the most powerful weapon to change the world.

zh: 这个问题有点难，但我可以试试。
en: This question is a bit difficult, but I can try.

zh: 你昨天上课迟到了吗？
en: Were you late for class yesterday?

zh: 他通过阅读许多书籍来拓宽视野。
en: He broadens his horizons by reading many books.

zh: 我们下周要考试，所以现在得复习。
en: We have an exam next week, so we need to review now.

zh: 请问图书馆几点关门？
en: Excuse me, what time does the library close?

zh: 请安静，大家开始做课堂练习。
en: Please be quiet, everyone start doing the class exercise.

zh: 学好一门语言需要耐心和练习。
en: Learning a language well requires patience and practice.

zh: 为什么太阳从东边升起？
en: Why does the sun rise in the east?

zh: 她对历史很感兴趣，经常去博物馆。
en: She is very interested in history and often goes to museums.

zh: 你把作业交给老师了吗？
en: Have you handed in your homework to the teacher?

zh: 别在课堂上玩手机。
en: Don't play with your phone in class.

zh: 这个实验需要按照步骤认真操作。
en: This experiment needs to be carried out carefully according to the steps.

zh: 他不仅聪明，而且非常勤奋。
en: He is not only smart but also very hardworking.

zh: 你能告诉我这个单词怎么拼写吗？
en: Can you tell me how to spell this word?

zh: 读书可以让我们获得知识。
en: Reading can help us gain knowledge.

zh: 请用心听讲，不要走神。
en: Please listen attentively and don't get distracted.

zh: 她正在为明天的演讲做准备。
en: She is preparing for tomorrow's speech.

zh: 你们小组讨论得怎么样了？
en: How is your group discussion going?

zh: 教育应该培养独立思考的能力。
en: Education should cultivate the ability to think independently.

zh: 我建议你每天背十个单词。
en: I suggest you memorize ten words every day.

zh: 这个公式很重要，请记下来。
en: This formula is very important, please write it down.

zh: 他小时候就展现出对科学的浓厚兴趣。
en: He showed a strong interest in science when he was young.

zh: 学习不是一蹴而就的事情，而是漫长的旅程。
en: Learning is not something achieved overnight; it is a long journey.

zh: 冬天很冷，记得穿暖和一些。
en: Winter is very cold, remember to dress warmly.

zh: 今天温度多少？
en: What's the temperature today?

zh: 下雪了，我们可以堆雪人。
en: It's snowing, we can make a snowman.

zh: 天气预报说明天会刮大风。
en: The weather forecast says it will be windy tomorrow.

zh: 秋天的树叶变黄了，真美。
en: The leaves turn yellow in autumn, it's beautiful.

zh: 请把窗户关上，外面风太大了。
en: Please close the window, it's too windy outside.

zh: 昨晚下了暴雨，路上都是积水。
en: There was a heavy rain last night, and the roads were flooded.

zh: 今天阳光明媚，适合出去散步。
en: It's sunny today, perfect for a walk.

zh: 你带伞了吗？好像要下雨。
en: Did you bring an umbrella? It looks like it's going to rain.

zh: 多穿点衣服，外面很冷。
en: Put on more clothes, it's cold outside.

zh: 为什么夏天的白天那么长？
en: Why are the days so long in summer?

zh: 今天有大雾，开车要小心。
en: There is thick fog today, drive carefully.

zh: 雪后整个城市变成了白色。
en: After the snow, the whole city turned white.

zh: 明天会放晴吗？
en: Will it clear up tomorrow?

zh: 六月到八月是这里的夏季。
en: June to August is summer here.

zh: 别在雷雨时站在树下。
en: Don't stand under a tree during a thunderstorm.

zh: 今年冬天比去年冷多了。
en: This winter is much colder than last year.

zh: 今天有点阴，但没下雨。
en: It's a bit cloudy today, but it's not raining.

zh: 请把空调关掉，我有点冷。
en: Please turn off the air conditioner, I feel a bit cold.

zh: 春天气温变化很大，容易感冒。
en: Spring temperatures change a lot, easy to catch a cold.

zh: 你经历过沙尘暴吗？
en: Have you ever experienced a sandstorm?

zh: 如果明天不下雨，我们就去爬山。
en: If it doesn't rain tomorrow, we'll go hiking.

zh: 秋天的夜晚开始变长了。
en: The nights start getting longer in autumn.

zh: 请张开嘴，说“啊”。
en: Please open your mouth and say 'ah'.

zh: 我的胃疼得厉害。
en: My stomach hurts badly.

zh: 你最近有没有过敏？
en: Have you had any allergies recently?

zh: 这个伤口需要消毒。
en: This wound needs to be disinfected.

zh: 我建议你做个全面体检。
en: I suggest you have a full check-up.

zh: 她因为感冒请了病假。
en: She took sick leave because of a cold.

zh: 记得按时服药。
en: Remember to take your medication on time.

zh: 这个疫苗安全吗？
en: Is this vaccine safe?

zh: 我昨天摔了一跤，膝盖擦破了。
en: I fell down yesterday and scraped my knee.

zh: 你需要打一针破伤风。
en: You need a tetanus shot.

zh: 手术后要好好休息。
en: Rest well after the surgery.

zh: 牙疼不是病，疼起来真要命。
en: Toothache is not a disease, but it can kill you when it hurts.

zh: 请把病历卡给我看一下。
en: Please show me your medical card.

zh: 这孩子咳嗽了好几天。
en: This child has been coughing for several days.

zh: 你要注意饮食清淡。
en: You should keep a light diet.

zh: 你的化验结果出来了。
en: Your test results are out.

zh: 这瓶眼药水每天滴两次。
en: Use this eye drop twice a day.

zh: 我经常感到头晕目眩。
en: I often feel dizzy and lightheaded.

zh: 他昨天刚做完阑尾炎手术。
en: He just had an appendectomy yesterday.

zh: 我们约个时间做理疗吧。
en: Let's schedule a time for physical therapy.

zh: 你吸烟吗？这对肺不好。
en: Do you smoke? It's bad for your lungs.

zh: 保持良好的心态有助于康复。
en: Keeping a positive attitude helps recovery.

zh: 爸爸，你明天能陪我玩吗？
en: Dad, can you play with me tomorrow?

zh: 晚上记得盖好被子。
en: Remember to cover yourself with the blanket at night.

zh: 我们一家人经常一起吃晚饭。
en: Our family often has dinner together.

zh: 你妹妹今天在学校表现很好。
en: Your little sister did very well at school today.

zh: 奶奶做的饺子是世界上最好吃的。
en: Grandma's dumplings are the best in the world.

zh: 哥哥，你能不能帮我修一下自行车？
en: Brother, can you help me fix my bike?

zh: 无论发生什么，家永远是最温暖的港湾。
en: No matter what happens, home is always the warmest harbor.

zh: 爷爷喜欢在阳台上晒太阳。
en: Grandpa likes to sit on the balcony and soak up the sun.

zh: 你要好好照顾弟弟。
en: You should take good care of your little brother.

zh: 妈妈，今天晚饭吃什么？
en: Mom, what's for dinner today?

zh: 我们周末一起去公园吧。
en: Let's go to the park together this weekend.

zh: 爸爸工作很辛苦，但他从不抱怨。
en: Dad works very hard, but he never complains.

zh: 姐姐的婚礼让我感动得哭了。
en: My sister's wedding made me cry with joy.

zh: 别忘了给外婆打电话。
en: Don't forget to call Grandma.

zh: 家里的小猫是我们最好的朋友。
en: The little cat at home is our best friend.

zh: 为什么你和表姐总是一起玩？
en: Why do you and your cousin always play together?

zh: 父母的爱是无私的。
en: Parents' love is selfless.

zh: 请你把房间收拾干净。
en: Please tidy up your room.

zh: 儿子，你长大了想做什么？
en: Son, what do you want to be when you grow up?

zh: 每次回家，妈妈都会给我一个拥抱。
en: Every time I come home, Mom gives me a hug.

zh: 叔叔和婶婶下个月要搬来和我们住。
en: Uncle and aunt are moving in with us next month.

zh: 不要和兄弟姐妹吵架，要互相帮助。
en: Don't argue with your siblings; help each other.

zh: 父亲节那天，我送给爸爸一张贺卡。
en: On Father's Day, I gave Dad a card.

zh: 你见过舅舅的新宝宝吗？
en: Have you seen Uncle's new baby?

zh: 家庭团聚是最幸福的时光。
en: Family reunions are the happiest times.

zh: 妈妈，给我讲个故事吧。
en: Mom, tell me a story.

zh: 虽然我们不住在一起，但心永远连在一起。
en: Even though we don't live together, our hearts are always connected.

zh: 爷爷教会了我下象棋。
en: Grandpa taught me how to play chess.

zh: 永远不要忘记，家人永远支持你。
en: Never forget that your family will always support you.

zh: 她看起来有点难过。
en: She looks a little sad.

zh: 他听到这个消息后非常兴奋。
en: He was very excited after hearing the news.

zh: 为什么你总是这么焦虑？
en: Why are you always so anxious?

zh: 保持微笑，你会感觉更好。
en: Keep smiling, you'll feel better.

zh: 我有点累，但还算开心。
en: I'm a bit tired, but still happy.

zh: 她突然大哭起来。
en: She suddenly burst into tears.

zh: 你能理解我的感受吗？
en: Can you understand how I feel?

zh: 他气得说不出话来。
en: He was too angry to speak.

zh: 让我们放松一下，享受这一刻。
en: Let's relax and enjoy this moment.

zh: 这让我想起了美好的往事。
en: This reminds me of happy memories.

zh: 听到你这么说，我很欣慰。
en: I'm relieved to hear you say that.

zh: 她的笑容温暖了我的心。
en: Her smile warmed my heart.

zh: 我对自己感到很失望。
en: I feel disappointed in myself.

zh: 你看起来很开心，发生什么好事了？
en: You look really happy, what's the good news?

zh: 请抱抱我，我需要安慰。
en: Please hug me, I need comfort.

zh: 有时候孤独也是一种享受。
en: Sometimes loneliness is a kind of enjoyment.

zh: 你觉得幸福是什么？
en: What do you think happiness is?

zh: 别太自责了，这不是你的错。
en: Don't blame yourself too much, it's not your fault.

zh: 我心里很乱，需要静一静。
en: My mind is all over the place, I need some quiet time.

zh: 她嫉妒他的成功。
en: She is jealous of his success.

zh: 试着深呼吸，冷静下来。
en: Try to take a deep breath and calm down.

zh: 这本小说让我感到悲伤。
en: This novel makes me feel sad.

zh: 你后悔当初的决定吗？
en: Do you regret the decision you made back then?

zh: 让我们庆祝一下这份喜悦吧！
en: Let's celebrate this joy!

zh: 电脑开机了。
en: The computer is on.

zh: 请按下电源键。
en: Please press the power button.

zh: 你的电脑系统是Windows还是Mac？
en: Is your computer system Windows or Mac?

zh: 我把文件存储在云端了。
en: I stored the file in the cloud.

zh: 这个软件需要更新。
en: This software needs an update.

zh: 如何清除浏览器缓存？
en: How do I clear the browser cache?

zh: 请确保你已连接Wi-Fi。
en: Make sure you are connected to Wi-Fi.

zh: 程序员正在调试代码。
en: The programmer is debugging the code.

zh: 这台笔记本电脑很轻便。
en: This laptop is very lightweight.

zh: 你经常用电脑做些什么？
en: What do you usually do on the computer?

zh: 别忘记给电脑定期杀毒。
en: Don't forget to run antivirus scans regularly.

zh: 为什么电脑运行得这么慢？
en: Why is the computer running so slowly?

zh: 请打开任务管理器。
en: Please open the Task Manager.

zh: 你用过哪些编程语言？
en: What programming languages have you used?

zh: 请保存你的工作再关机。
en: Please save your work before shutting down.

zh: 这个网址打不开。
en: This website can't be opened.

zh: 电脑屏幕变得模糊了。
en: The computer screen has become blurry.

zh: 你需要安装一个PDF阅读器。
en: You need to install a PDF reader.

zh: 这台打印机和我的电脑不兼容。
en: This printer is not compatible with my computer.

zh: 请用两根手指在触控板上滚动。
en: Please scroll on the trackpad with two fingers.

zh: 我的键盘有几个按键失灵了。
en: Some keys on my keyboard are not working.

zh: 你能帮我恢复删除的文件吗？
en: Can you help me recover the deleted file?

zh: 请重启路由器。
en: Please restart the router.

zh: 不要同时打开太多程序。
en: Don't open too many programs at the same time.

zh: 这个漏洞已经被修复了。
en: This vulnerability has been fixed.

zh: 如何设置自动备份？
en: How do I set up automatic backups?

zh: 请确保你使用的是最新版本。
en: Please make sure you are using the latest version.
